# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
| | |
---|---|---
Supporter: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxdUF2PgyAQ_DX4hoHVgj740F7r3zDIR-UO1CCe6b8_aJre5ZINm8wuM7OjuhMYSgrbAQFKGtISQlMvaXnjl5ZV53NDWF_x_oZqovT2tRi1zMKpzxh2v5Zy8cXUESENp4q1tFacjJJSUACkHU-KALC2cN0U47qh6oygT3UcR_mfJ8FZAFX9Hv3gtbK7R9VVe2HdMBkELOPbsgepE-7lMItUL1wKvwp7n9PkdUozmLB4HCeNMy9ezPBXctjEtxZeByvfHMsc9RwTRV6MepDrI2y_GlGH7GjdEiZdETq1HtY5uzGe0rlno89AkhVnzaND_IIA9t2q1J63g5ZjSsoAHhkArmUrsRiNwhIYq4VWjanqvAwf6Y2PVb9_vkjLZx4Z5dcfmJqO_A) Notification Status: Signed Up
Donald J. Trump August 8th, 2021
This is not an infrastructure bill, this is the beginning of the Green New Deal. The bill I proposed, which Mitch McConnell couldn't do anything with, was pure infrastructure. I want what is best for America, not what's best for the Communist Democrat Party. This will be a big victory for the Democrats and will be used against Republicans in the upcoming elections. Schumer is using the threat of "we can do it the hard way or do it the easy way" and keeping people in town. McConnell never did that on a real infrastructure bill. Hopefully the House will be much stronger than the Senate.

Congratulations to Senator Bill Hagerty in remaining true to "AMERICA FIRST!"

**Here's what we're looking at, Derek: Pennsylvania is currently the *only* Senate race rated as a toss-up in the entire country.** And it's going to be one of the most competitive races of 2022.

The amount of early momentum we can build for John's candidacy will shape the state of the race for months to come, and that starts with reaching our goal before tonight at midnight. We’ve got a good feeling we can _actually win this thing_ — but getting a campaign off the ground the right way depends on the amount of grassroots support John receives from folks like you, Derek.

[**Please split a $25 donation between Common Good VA and John's campaign before tonight's deadline to get on the record as one of John's supporters as runs for Senate. name: Scott Fitzgerald & Glenn Grothman
subject: Democrat Failure has CONSEQUENCES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
We need to hold them accountable.
Peter**We knew that _Joe Biden & the socialists_ would harm our country - _and now Wisconsin families are feeling it! _**Out in Washington, we're holding the line to protect against the very worst of it. name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099080:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099080:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099080:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099080:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099080:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099080:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099080:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099080:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099081:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099080:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099082:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099083:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099084:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58099085:JX4yoSlNd:m:1:3253819041:67A0285AAE973A4D0B65753695549D63:r)
---|---|---

But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct. The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay! It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. In fact after the pursuit, other officers found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | | | ---|---|--- {{unsubscribeUrl}} This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-42659339493-echo7-EFF9787E510A05A75D9A20A0DC4D8BA4@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of August 9th: Stop the awful “infrastructure” bill NOW!
body:
| |
---
This week, we must continue to fight the so-called “infrastructure” bill that will pave the way for mass amnesty and a tax on every mile you drive. Please share this call to action by forwarding it and posting on social media. Thank you!

**Action items for this week include:**
* National: Stop amnesty in the “infrastructure” bill
* Local: Host or attend an “I do not consent” sign-waving event to protest medical mandates like masks and forced vaccines
* Local: Sign up to attend an August local government meeting

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
We strongly oppose the reckless $1.2 trillion infrastructure package. The Democrats have tied the bi-partisan $1.2 trillion “infrastructure” bill to mass amnesty for millions and millions of illegal immigrants.

Furthermore, the bill includes a national motor vehicle per-mile user tax for every driver in the country. Gas prices are already skyrocketing, and now the Democrats want to add a tax to every mile you drive. Tell us more about how they’re middle class champions though...

The Democrats are committed to destroying every part of this nation, from our Constitution to our sovereignty, and they will use every sneaky, underhanded, unethical method they can to do it.

This is less to do with fixing infrastructure and more to do with approving reckless spending and approving a long socialist wish list.

There are 17 Republicans supporting this bill. Click the link below to call and educate the 17 Republican Senators who have already signed on to the $1.2 trillion infrastructure bill on the rest of the deal. Amnesty and mileage tax are not infrastructure!
|
---
**NATIONAL
Stop amnesty in the “infrastructure” bill
**
The Democrats are tying the bi-partisan $1.2 trillion “infrastructure” to mass amnesty for millions and millions of illegal immigrants. **This is the same call to action as last week because the Senate pushed the vote to this week, either Monday or Tuesday.** **Please make your calls as early as you can on Monday.** There are 17 Republicans supporting this bill. Please see our website for the list of Senators, to see if yours are on there. And, if they’re not, call Mitch McConnell because he is also supporting it, and is the Senate Minority Leader.
[STOP THE BILL](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIxLTA4Njc2MzFlYmExNjRkM2I4MDcyODgzNTgxN2Q2YWQw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYWN0aW9ucy9hY3Rpb24taXRlbXMtMjAyMS0wOC0wOS8_bWlkPTQ0MTYyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSNzdG9wYW1uZXN0eQ&K=5_AypdeS5LD39-zayLo2Hg)
|
---
House Democrats are expected to unveil revised language for H.R. 4, the John Lewis Voting Rights and Advancement Act. The bill would not only impose a new interpretation that places states under federal controls but would impose pre-clearance limits for all states for any election changes. This bill, similar to the failed "For the People Act," would prevent states from enacting or changing laws that would make it easy to vote and hard to cheat.

Do you want the federal government to control elections and dictate how states run them? The Democrats don't want states like Florida, Georgia, Texas to improve their elections with safeguards against fraud and mass confusion. With H.R. 4, Democrats can guarantee states will remain vulnerable to voter fraud, and thus, enabling that fraud to occur.
|
---
**LOCAL
Host or attend an “I do not consent” sign-waving protest**
If we do not stand up now, we may lose the opportunity to fight this without more sever consequences. Please organize a sign-waving!! There are children who will know nothing but an authoritarian, dystopian America if we don’t stop this now.

**Please plan a sign-waving protest against these overbearing and unAmerican mandates in your local community.** [**Sign up here.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIxLTA4Njc2MzFlYmExNjRkM2I4MDcyODgzNTgxN2Q2YWQw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9ub3Rjb25zZW50Lz9taWQ9NDQxNjImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=pcnfnlJ9HSmIGTBM1Q_HdQ)**** We created [a mini-toolkit](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIxLTA4Njc2MzFlYmExNjRkM2I4MDcyODgzNTgxN2Q2YWQw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5uZXQvZG9ub3Rjb25zZW50LWhvd3RvLWd1aWRlP21pZD00NDE2MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=xVkf1mNvdcsExClAGqebiw) with sign suggestions and more to help you get this done.

Stand for our liberty. No more masks. No new lockdowns. No other medical mandates.
[CREATE YOUR SIGN WAVING EVENT](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIxLTA4Njc2MzFlYmExNjRkM2I4MDcyODgzNTgxN2Q2YWQw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9ub3Rjb25zZW50Lz9taWQ9NDQxNjImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=zpOEIDLMdA2qLuW6DrCpyA)
|
---
The newest episode of **Red, White and Blueprint** is out for you to watch and share! This month’s episode is Episode #5, “The Color of Money.” If you have not watched any of this amazing docuseries, produced by grassroots activists in Shasta County, CA, you are missing out!

[Watch the trailer for the whole series](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIxLTA4Njc2MzFlYmExNjRkM2I4MDcyODgzNTgxN2Q2YWQw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1FLUdQU0g3SGVFYyZtaWQ9NDQxNjImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=-KBH6WgwzN9zGAdgocaZEQ), and then watch [all of the episodes](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIxLTA4Njc2MzFlYmExNjRkM2I4MDcyODgzNTgxN2Q2YWQw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlcmVkd2hpdGVhbmRibHVlcHJpbnQuY29tL21lZGlhLmh0bWw_bWlkPTQ0MTYyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=H53VNFjIR7Xf3EZs5KZQog). Each episode isn’t long, and they are entertaining and well done. The work they are doing is inspiring and holds lessons for all of us, about how we must take control of our local governments, because in many places, they are just as corrupt as the federal government.

Don’t wait! Watch them today!
|
---
**LOCAL
Sign up to attend an August local government meeting**
[**Sign up and commit to attend a local government meeting in August.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIxLTA4Njc2MzFlYmExNjRkM2I4MDcyODgzNTgxN2Q2YWQw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLWxvY2FsLWdvdmVybm1lbnQvP21pZD00NDE2MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=-z2AwNhBLp5kiDOtmu3bfA)**** Local government bodies include city or county councils or commissions, boards of supervisors, school boards, and so on. They will often have names that include the words "county," "city," "township," "town," "district," etc.

[Take a look at our suggested items to research](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIxLTA4Njc2MzFlYmExNjRkM2I4MDcyODgzNTgxN2Q2YWQw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2FsbHMtdG8tYWN0aW9uL3Jlc2VhcmNoaW5nLXlvdXItbG9jYWwtZ292ZXJubWVudC8_bWlkPTQ0MTYyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=XVx1Y14gZlAnA-tMlFu9KA) before you attend as well.

If you didn’t have a chance to attend a school board meeting in July, we will return to school boards in September, so take the opportunity to attend a different local government meeting in August.

**Remember, local governments are some of the entities that locked us down and mandated masks. They also have the ability to resist federal and state tyranny, and they’re some of the easiest government bodies to change or influence. It is crucial that you are plugged into your local government and know what they are doing.**
[LET US KNOW YOU’LL BE ATTENDING](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIxLTA4Njc2MzFlYmExNjRkM2I4MDcyODgzNTgxN2Q2YWQw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLWxvY2FsLWdvdmVybm1lbnQvP21pZD00NDE2MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=zts9dOrK7kM0A5va7WB4EQ)
|
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIxLTA4Njc2MzFlYmExNjRkM2I4MDcyODgzNTgxN2Q2YWQw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlP21pZD00NDE2MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=yst7_QDUKTeDHQRV-9dQ7w)
|

| | Terry is having a bad week, Derek.

His campaign finished off July with strong fundraising numbers, but he told me since August started, contributions have **plummeted** — _in fact, they’ve almost completely stopped._

This is the _worst_ time for Terry to be losing momentum, Derek.

His Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin is already planning on spending $75 of his own money on this race. And now, if we can’t help Terry get his fundraising back on pace, **he’ll have no shot of catching up.**

**[Derek, Terry needs our help. Will you chip in whatever you can today to power Terry’s grassroots campaign for Virginia governor? clean_body: This is the worst time. | | | = | | Terry is having a bad week, Derek. His campaign finished off July with strong fundraising numbers, but he told me since August started, contributions have plummeted — in fact, they’ve almost completely stopped. This is the worst time for Terry to be losing momentum, Derek. His Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin is already planning on spending $75 of his own money on this race. And now, if we can’t help Terry get his fundraising back on pace, he’ll have no shot of catching up. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Look, election experts are already saying this race will be too close to call. Terry’s got to do everything he can to stop Trump and his handpicked candidate. But he can’t do that without help, Derek. It’s going to take nothing short of a massive grassroots effort — that’s where you and I come in. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for all you do, Mark Warner =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Alexandria, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Team Walker
subject: Americans don’t want more lockdowns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
We have to stop giving the CDC so much power over our lives! Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/2bf94eb11f12ad42/eb8eb40bbcca18d3c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, **Americans don’t want more lockdowns — they want more liberty**. Mark is deeply troubled by the latest guidelines from the CDC about masking, as well as vaccine mandates beginning to pop up in parts of the country. The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention is clearly about CONTROL. They aren’t just trying to control diseases anymore though; they’re trying to control our lives as well! _Liberty has a threshold, and Americans have had enough of being told what to do._ The CDC, Fauci, and the Biden Administration need to understand that the American people are DONE masking their children in schools, shutting down their businesses, and closing their houses of worship. name: Greater Georgia
subject: ICYMI: GREATER GEORGIA RESULTS FEATURED IN ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION OP-ED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, AUG. 9, 2021
ICYMI: GREATER GEORGIA RESULTS FEATURED IN ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION OP-ED
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler wrote an [op-ed featured in the ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018xMk_CBdfHNq4wV6CbkdHskMbyQRQvRvZ8pcQjkWH9te-McUF3U3Q-sVjS0v0zPzAwpMYgr8zXSjChtPlkVNX4RrnmRcfJxn8Mo5dWnYg9nG5D2V0zkoMtcwMppUF150f-LXv-OC4wCCJ7ubzsqxIws0RP9DEYeNwRwbxhx26MciD1BDt6j0ayqTKfddS610-8kj_StJA1GRibDG7VIQJnt2iUyy_N97b5Hp_1TO4lZE_XQwmuq3zUEd7Qqh2IZs0ffbziNiUZVrvnZth4JGpA==&c=gJDpvkez3hDv3mG4-wUmwgmg8uR1n6LrIsP2ztMNlMImev_DcRespg==&ch=yTb997J5PHICMTrBdxuABECI8Bk_EBEaU_utw3GW5uFF5q_jT25MXQ==)[Atlanta Journal-Constitution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018xMk_CBdfHNq4wV6CbkdHskMbyQRQvRvZ8pcQjkWH9te-McUF3U3Q-sVjS0v0zPzAwpMYgr8zXSjChtPlkVNX4RrnmRcfJxn8Mo5dWnYg9nG5D2V0zkoMtcwMppUF150f-LXv-OC4wCCJ7ubzsqxIws0RP9DEYeNwRwbxhx26MciD1BDt6j0ayqTKfddS610-8kj_StJA1GRibDG7VIQJnt2iUyy_N97b5Hp_1TO4lZE_XQwmuq3zUEd7Qqh2IZs0ffbziNiUZVrvnZth4JGpA==&c=gJDpvkez3hDv3mG4-wUmwgmg8uR1n6LrIsP2ztMNlMImev_DcRespg==&ch=yTb997J5PHICMTrBdxuABECI8Bk_EBEaU_utw3GW5uFF5q_jT25MXQ==) highlighting the organization's record of [results](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018xMk_CBdfHNq4wV6CbkdHskMbyQRQvRvZ8pcQjkWH9te-McUF3U3Q-sVjS0v0zPzmXQNzBBxeETUCMRvro35cn33439y936J7Gh9c00yTTsTXRhZ8dTQ0gyYSkXUjHNma4o5bZ7TALcEANJlFiDiKFLAqlnQvtNcN8biGKIJsZmeWkqK1hHfsE5E-DbCPX634_2uA_aNc18XUTEj0qiatC5LNYQwZqbsB-UWs_Uv06eSqiUjgcwQ1pHzw3T25FRuQbuR7qEe9OT7_FsUqUYmnA3HHq_QJ2Qp0VvYS-d-gzXx8KX7ecru24qHvTb-kORW&c=gJDpvkez3hDv3mG4-wUmwgmg8uR1n6LrIsP2ztMNlMImev_DcRespg==&ch=yTb997J5PHICMTrBdxuABECI8Bk_EBEaU_utw3GW5uFF5q_jT25MXQ==). Specifically, she discusses how Greater Georgia has already registered thousands of new conservatives voters, engaged hundreds of thousands more, and helped to secure a [major win](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018xMk_CBdfHNq4wV6CbkdHskMbyQRQvRvZ8pcQjkWH9te-McUF3U3Q5B0_c0OP7sxjH50lA-4KzXdM01paGBrA4Y4EgipGNJY4QlFGSH6TIYpcSKk7rFTPuIC-HdFJSMqWwiWTjOm19b9J9aJn5luw0GAQM0K518DV7eETBw0uRGF-c_xMSRU4Xcdfr5enPjUIppbzEaxVRBNGZcvm0-Kxp8LAGd91JyZMQ8dhZWtFy4=&c=gJDpvkez3hDv3mG4-wUmwgmg8uR1n6LrIsP2ztMNlMImev_DcRespg==&ch=yTb997J5PHICMTrBdxuABECI8Bk_EBEaU_utw3GW5uFF5q_jT25MXQ==) for conservative values in the special election for State House District 34 in Cobb County. She concluded by discussing how Greater Georgia's framework will be a valuable asset ahead of the 2022 cycle and beyond.
Opinion: New conservative advocacy group showing results in Ga.
As a businessperson, analysis of facts and figures is second nature. I firmly believe that during the 2020 General and 2021 Senate Runoff elections in Georgia -- in which I was a candidate -- conservatives were swimming against the tide.
From a global pandemic to sweeping changes in our election rules to voting irregularities and a lack of oversight, these cumulative factors contributed to a perfect storm. Equally as important, the fact is that for years, the Democrats -- under Stacey Abrams -- had amassed a voter registration and engagement machine for which there was no equivalent answer on the conservative side. These progressive organizations, bankrolled by out-of-state liberal activists and dark money donors, held an unchecked monopoly on voter outreach in our state -- mobilizing new voters and closing the gap to push Georgia into battleground status.
That's why -- after a thorough post-election analysis of all of these factors -- we took action, launching Greater Georgia in February. As a conservative voter mobilization organization focused on registering new voters, engaging diverse and underrepresented communities, and defending election integrity in our state, Greater Georgia's mission is to register, empower our citizens to use their vote to shape the future of our state.
From the outset, we knew how challenging this work would be. There are no shortcuts to the effort required to build an operation to ensure more voices across our state are heard. There are well over 1 million unregistered residents across Georgia. There are more than 400,000 registered but inactive conservative voters who have not cast a ballot in the past two elections. And there were 339,000 conservative Georgians who voted in the November general election -- but didn't come back out to vote in the January 2021 runoffs.
The only way to start is with that first step, which we took in February -- and just six months in, our work has already delivered results. We have registered thousands of new, conservative voters. We have engaged over 170,000 registered but inactive voters. We have reached over 700,000 Georgians to promote election integrity in our state. We have recruited over 200 volunteers, and held numerous roundtables, training sessions, and registration drives. Those results alone would be solid enough for the first six months of any start-up.
But the first true test for Greater Georgia came along in June in a special election for State House District 34 with the retirement of Rep. Bert Reeves. The seat, located in Democrat-leaning Cobb County, was a true toss-up -- and a top target for Stacey Abrams, whose organization, Fair Fight, went all in to win the race, which included Abrams' endorsement of the liberal candidate.
Beginning in April, Greater Georgia began organizing and building out a targeted engagement program hyper-focused on registering new voters within that district. We recruited volunteers and put boots on the ground, going door-to-door to educate citizens on the impact this seat would have on their freedoms, families and way of life. Along with our registration program, we executed a strategic plan to mobilize voters through text, telephone, direct mail, and paid digital advertising efforts.
When the final results of the runoff were tallied in the July 13th runoff election between conservative businessman Devan Seabaugh and liberal activist Priscilla Smith, the results were astounding. Not only did Seabaugh win convincingly, taking 63 percent of the vote compared to Smith's 37 percent, he overperformed the 2020 race for the seat by a full 7 points. Based on our post-election analysis of multiple targeted voter contacts, Greater Georgia's efforts directly contributed to 23 percent of the vote by engaging new, low-propensity and disenfranchised voters -- putting a swing suburban seat, in the 3rd-most-populous county in our state, firmly back in the red column.
As conservatives look toward 2022, there is much work to be done. I firmly believe we are now building the organization and infrastructure needed to win across the state. If you aren't satisfied with the direction of our country, want to protect freedom and opportunities for your families, or simply want to support fair, representative elections -- I encourage you to join us in our efforts. Together, we will make Georgia greater for generations to come.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018xMk_CBdfHNq4wV6CbkdHskMbyQRQvRvZ8pcQjkWH9te-McUF3U3Q-sVjS0v0zPzAwpMYgr8zXSjChtPlkVNX4RrnmRcfJxn8Mo5dWnYg9nG5D2V0zkoMtcwMppUF150f-LXv-OC4wCCJ7ubzsqxIws0RP9DEYeNwRwbxhx26MciD1BDt6j0ayqTKfddS610-8kj_StJA1GRibDG7VIQJnt2iUyy_N97b5Hp_1TO4lZE_XQwmuq3zUEd7Qqh2IZs0ffbziNiUZVrvnZth4JGpA==&c=gJDpvkez3hDv3mG4-wUmwgmg8uR1n6LrIsP2ztMNlMImev_DcRespg==&ch=yTb997J5PHICMTrBdxuABECI8Bk_EBEaU_utw3GW5uFF5q_jT25MXQ==) to read the full article.

name: Team Franchot
subject: All eyes on Maryland
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
As you know, Peter Franchot is the frontrunner in the Democratic field. He’s already gained the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials from every county in the state, and he was the first candidate to release a detailed policy-platform outlining the bold agenda of his administration.
Don’t just take our word for it -- here’s what the experts are saying:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterfranchotfrontrunner?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterfranchotfrontrunner?amount=20.22]Peter Franchot is in a strong position to win this competitive race and become our next Governor -- but he can’t do it without your help. We have an ambitious goal to gain 500 new grassroots donations during the month of August, which is why we are looking to get just 17 new donations today -- the number of donations we need every day this month to beat our goal. So what do you say, Peter?
If you are able, will you chip in whatever you can to build our people-powered movement?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterfranchotfrontrunner?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterfranchotfrontrunner?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterfranchotfrontrunner?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterfranchotfrontrunner?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterfranchotfrontrunner]The competitiveness of this race means that all eyes will be on Maryland in 2022. And while we’re incredibly excited about our chances of winning the Governor’s race, you can also be sure that the Trump Republican Party will do everything they can to prevent that from happening -- including flooding our state with millions of dollars in dark money.
To fight back, we need to build a critical mass of grassroots supporters that will help us meet our fundraising goals, so that we can continue to ramp-up our statewide strategy in the coming weeks and months. Crucially, we can’t do that without your help.
We have the opportunity to change the way that government does business in 2022. Together, let’s secure a better and brighter future for Maryland’s communities.
Click here to help us meet our goal of 500 new grassroots donors for the month of August. We need just 17 donations today to keep our goal on track! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterfranchotfrontrunner?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot

We have an ambitious goal to gain 500 new grassroots donations during the month of August, which is why we are looking to get just 17 new donations today -- the number of donations we need every day this month to beat our goal. So what do you say, Peter? If you are able, will you chip in whatever you can to build our people-powered movement? CHIP IN $10 [] CHIP IN $20.22 [] CHIP IN $50 [] CHIP IN $100 [] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [ competitiveness of this race means that all eyes will be on Maryland in 2022. And while we’re incredibly excited about our chances of winning the Governor’s race, you can also be sure that the Trump Republican Party will do everything they can to prevent that from happening -- including flooding our state with millions of dollars in dark money. To fight back, we need to build a critical mass of grassroots supporters that will help us meet our fundraising goals, so that we can continue to ramp-up our statewide strategy in the coming weeks and months. Crucially, we can’t do that without your help. We have the opportunity to change the way that government does business in 2022. Together, let’s secure a better and brighter future for Maryland’s communities. Click here to help us meet our goal of 500 new grassroots donors for the month of August. On January 6th, 2021, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, putting a bedrock principle of our democracy -- the peaceful transfer of power -- at risk. They were inspired by Donald Trump’s lies and egged on by extremists like Ted Cruz.

Despite the tragic outcome, Republicans keep doubling down on Trump’s anti-democratic lies.

_That’s what makes the January 6 Commission so important. We have to understand why the insurrection happened so we can stop one from ever happening again._

**[With Virginia Republicans like Glenn Youngkin doubling down on Trump’s lies with so-called “election integrity rallies,” we want to know -- do you support the work of the January 6 Commission?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpQsPf-uG1QFn06nmTUHkl2O5hlzFufylb_2WHV36A4VSsZUv5QR8FrQfb_9jHwrelhyn4O1XvNGxzuiTpZe5W_2BYTrqk9kIhSYxre4pDktFFtBv_D2yZiM5uqWkvfiatq3DCVUyOPIxwx1UK4zyg1gVG_MqoBJfd2PJCB93p6Ho5IDzICqoWmkLdDdc8rNgyn-llFukpVlqMlwsAXVMRSlykoYcNYYtqXg3pLHjNLer68d-sYoarBiQ9g9_9nozlQ/3eb/-p-zQ0G4RkuUHFhxt9svRA/h1/Ry29LtiIh9-rqv6XTmcYKM30LTqJjvDyNrqA_xi58E0)** **[ YES ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpRnBIRF-KdyXSf38M48q4npAL0R94wH1P7C3DfBzc8EY99hJWv626w_CXCnk5jYP4_2-Il1TeYZxvonyk2FmdzPTvvBp4iqnwrlFJtSDwohvOzDs-YbUmxKXqujMHXvJ5oTgbfpI7XgTPnp8bzzHCAiA8RPvEp7cIFon8CTTYhDfKsIqs7I0fSD_661MrsDWDIMWDhfzBKEKQyeQPv3kgz41Tr5qR7LXpIgj20Lmd2k0Iw8gBi5Bc79z1auRhdmSBQ/3eb/-p-zQ0G4RkuUHFhxt9svRA/h2/VyGWdXsAj4J3prNkAYzxlm9PGHKDq_FtA2doV5XxBNk)
[ NO ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpZjGlVHTHp6uNYsFuMSAwsspkGVzw9Z0cxEITrpp6p92an4sxwAzxhnetDWy5S0Z65mPSvFb-42UG5OQDwRbJ750qx9c_K4VWaaZyLgB8RYBE4lvSjEImWyaGTScvyjXh51pyNAggZIQDSMIWglJFM2c9xUgEzUinu0ugzJdK8_CNNvfQKzh81z7T-ZKEDt6ZlnqgXX5FHy9cL4UeVKx-XVdNuod_pZE8JayARy7Ag5J-u5Z_ISqbeNpSbVLU_5wCw/3eb/-p-zQ0G4RkuUHFhxt9svRA/h3/yxO_CncOLCWbiLVHB4kXAmEJ1cLeuT_PCg5B_7gVauM) ** Republicans across the country continue to sabotage our elections. In state after state, they are introducing racist voter suppression bills to stop people from voting. Now, Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin wants to bring those same anti-democratic laws to Virginia.

We can’t let guys like Glenn Youngkin get away with taking away our freedom to vote. The January 6 Commission is a huge opportunity to hold them accountable.

name: Jane Timken for Ohio
subject: Defend the Police - Join Jane Timken on August 28th
body:
Peter,

While the radical left continues their call to defund the police, it is
crucial that Ohio's great men and women in law enforcement know that we
have their back!

To show our appreciation, we are hosting a *Timken Backs the Blue BBQ* with
former New York City Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik, who guided the
police response during the 9/11 attacks on the World Trade Center.

Please join him and Jane on August 28th at two locations and come thank
your local law enforcement!

*Timken Backs the Blue BBQ with NYC Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik*

Date: August 28th

Time: 11:30AM

Location: Timken HQ. 921 Chatham Ln Columbus, OH 43221

Sign up: here
<https://janetimkenforohio-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com/Redirect?ukey=17Y7Mc4raXaraHB19uF_vNq0F6gTGLNYf0oWax57NFJE-322438404&key=YAMMID-33641508&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fforms%2Fd%2Fe%2F1FAIpQLSd5DVZ4Bh9tIL6s9oF3i-d8DRTwAPSzgjGsaeZk1RkLE6-Rkw%2Fviewform>

*JTFO Intern & Volunteer Rally with NYC Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik*

Date: August 28th

Time: 4:30PM

Location: Mahoning County GOP HQ. 8381 Market St, Boardman, OH 44512

Sign up: here
<https://janetimkenforohio-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com/Redirect?ukey=17Y7Mc4raXaraHB19uF_vNq0F6gTGLNYf0oWax57NFJE-322438404&key=YAMMID-33641508&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fforms%2Fd%2Fe%2F1FAIpQLSd5DVZ4Bh9tIL6s9oF3i-d8DRTwAPSzgjGsaeZk1RkLE6-Rkw%2Fviewform>

See you there!

-Jane Timken for Ohio

It’s an urgent moment because I’m running against a GOP extremist who has been endorsed by Donald Trump — not just once, not just twice, but three times. Derek, we beat Trump last year, and now, we’ve got to do it again by beating his hand-picked guy Glenn Youngkin. That's why I’m launching our biggest goal yet: one million dollars online before the end of August. And I’m counting on you to help me get there. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Here’s the honest truth, Derek. In a race this tight, money matters. **It was startling to hear a LOUD BANG on my door at 6:00 in the morning -- and then to be greeted by 7 FBI agents, ready to raid my apartment.**
---
The agents proceeded to take seven or eight electronic devices from my home.
---
But there's one thing Biden's FBI agents refused to take: _Hunter Biden 's hard drive -- even though the warrant REQUIRED them to take it._
---
I'll tell you why they didn't take it...
---
...Because the hard drive contains EVIDENCE of the Biden Crime Family violating our country's laws for thirty years.
---
That's why liberal big tech corporations CENSORED me during the final weeks of the 2020 election every time I tried to expose incriminating evidence of the Biden Crime Family.
---
**And it 's also why the Deep State wants to throw me in jail.**
---
But, as you know, I'm a fighter just like President Trump.
---
_**Biden 's government goons can censor me, spy on me, and raid my apartment -- but I will NEVER stop fighting.**_
---
Now I hope you'll fight for my freedom.

While this fund I've set up is called the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, it's not only about __my_ freedom..._
---
...It's about YOURS.
---
We need to face the brutal fact that every single American citizen's rights hang in the balance in Biden's America.
---
If the federal government can get away with these police state tactics, then America as we know it is GONE.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for _OUR_ freedoms.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102231:69cDKSlcN:m:1:3253819041:97ADC125C9A39BE9E7F538FCEDD893FE:r)

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=76fc145c69&u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=af2e6d9e1d)

---
| | Team-

You know it. We know it. We say it every year. But 2021 is **THE MOST** important campaign season in most of our lifetimes here in Virginia, and we have candidates who have _**razor thin**_ margins running for re-election and Republicans are pouring millions into those districts to unseat our Progressive champions. One of those Delegates is Joshua Cole from the 28th District:
[JOSH COLE'S RACE IS CURRENTLY RATED A TOSS UP ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=54551b0cf2&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=109093afe4&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [Check Out the Joint Fundraising Page Here](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=92d28a4509&e=76fc145c69)
Josh was one of the "majority makers" back in 2019, bringing Democrats into control of the House by just 5 seats. That is why the 28th district is crucial for us to hold onto in 2021. Since taking the House, Democrats have been able to right the ship taking Virginia from being one of the worst states to vote in to passing our own voting rights legislation. In addition, the Commonwealth has legalized marijuana, expanded protections around Reproductive rights, passed sweeping environmental legislation, and even banned the Death Penalty for the first time in the South.

Not only is he one of the youngest elected officials in the General Assembly, Josh has been a leader on everything that we have been working towards: carrying bills to ban corporations from contributing to political campaigns and to instate a moratorium on new fossil fuel projects. **We must keep him in the House so that he can continue to do the work that we need him to do. **

The 28th District is almost 50-50 when it comes to Democrats vs Republicans so every. vote. counts. [Can you help us out by contributing $25, $50, $100, or more to our tandem fundraising effort](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=4e41012c94&e=76fc145c69)[ to make sure that Josh gets re-elected? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=092471f534&e=76fc145c69)
---
| In Solidarity,
Matt

---

---

We rely solely on everyday donors like you to make sure that we support elected officials who only answer to you, the people. name: Team DeSantis
subject: Forgetful Biden
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fiVdsIkPtjDhJkugNDAWb_A7o3Pub-aWKqdb9bApvAjLnB-h-3D2ghtFtHsRGA9IxvXa33fwrDuoPxS8qawauGpDkTlYOYu1foXKJKYjb4hLtp5Iy969q4-6NZ62ggfeYW42YrfRsfkCGj2mqb9gdg==&c=blth1SI3uAVJ4AynPycHdEJW71pA10I5xdYi4BTwG9YpyN9OKg6Edw==&ch=tUbIAIY9wS8tFPjJZwEYYqTFOH81Zsn60w4AHWKSeg3kRoqw6LLTNw==)
---
| Peter,
Despite his administration's incessant focus on Governor DeSantis, Joe Biden pretended not to know who Governor Ron DeSantis was. That begs the question if Joe Biden doesn't remember Governor DeSantis, what else has he forgotten?
From the border crisis to rising inflation, it's clear there's a lot that Joe Biden has forgotten about.
He's forgotten to tackle the crisis on our southern border that is reaching a fever pitch as hundreds of thousands of migrants, many COVID-positive, continue crossing over our border unchecked. Joe has also forgotten about addressing the inflation that is taking dollars out of the wallets of Americans and about providing internet to the freedom fighters in Cuba.
Biden has even forgotten about our Constitution, something he has a sworn duty to uphold. He's openly admitting some policies his administration is implementing are unconstitutional.
So, to help with Joe Biden's confusion, here's a reminder of exactly who Governor DeSantis is:
Governor DeSantis is the governor who stands up for the rights of Floridians. He protects the rights of parents to decide what's best for their families - NOT unelected government bureaucrats - and protects the rights of kids to have a proper in-person education.
Governor DeSantis is the governor who fights to keep Florida's businesses open and for Florida's workers to have an opportunity to earn a living. He's the governor who STANDS UP to lockdowns.
Joe Biden is in a constant state of confusion, so it should come as no surprise he didn't remember who Governor DeSantis is. But if Joe Biden continues to come after the liberties of Floridians, he'll learn in a hurry EXACTLY who Governor Ron DeSantis is and WHAT HE'S MADE OF.
[Add your name to our petition to thank Governor DeSantis for standing up to Joe Biden.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fiVdsIkPtjDhJkugNDAWb_A7o3Pub-aWKqdb9bApvAjLnB-h-3D2glFDXKQ2VQa8SVEBe9NoyPPzXjOvjHdPcj5k_vrhcgb2XhY73a7Al7jnvdjS2kEiD5ITgqk2MR5dU2t6Zd3nOnKUdEY6se54S0mAGMLDitSCWoMbR3uXoIQ=&c=blth1SI3uAVJ4AynPycHdEJW71pA10I5xdYi4BTwG9YpyN9OKg6Edw==&ch=tUbIAIY9wS8tFPjJZwEYYqTFOH81Zsn60w4AHWKSeg3kRoqw6LLTNw==)
Thank you for fighting with us, Team DeSantis

Joe has also forgotten about addressing the inflation that is taking dollars out of the wallets of Americans and about providing internet to the freedom fighters in Cuba. Biden has even forgotten about our Constitution, something he has a sworn duty to uphold. He's openly admitting some policies his administration is implementing are unconstitutional. So, to help with Joe Biden's confusion, here's a reminder of exactly who Governor DeSantis is: Governor DeSantis is the governor who stands up for the rights of Floridians. He protects the rights of parents to decide what's best for their families - NOT unelected government bureaucrats - and protects the rights of kids to have a proper in-person education. Governor DeSantis is the governor who fights to keep Florida's businesses open and for Florida's workers to have an opportunity to earn a living. He's the governor who STANDS UP to lockdowns. Joe Biden is in a constant state of confusion, so it should come as no surprise he didn't remember who Governor DeSantis is. But if Joe Biden continues to come after the liberties of Floridians, he'll learn in a hurry EXACTLY who Governor Ron DeSantis is and WHAT HE'S MADE OF. == Thank you for fighting with us, Team DeSantis | | == | == | == == == | | Sponsored by Friends of Ron DeSantis. | | | | | | | Friends of Ron DeSantis | 610 S. Boulevard, Tampa, FL 33606 | | Sent by mailto:info@rondesantis.com

name: John Castorani
subject: Re: Hillary Clinton and Benghazi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountableToday I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=01b12d99f2304f2887c420d58101485d&_t=KnEMliBAhNN7oqMdQ4lqys319c57slkWB9EdUNg8_nmV5bjUUbuMYiugCzFvCxicaisX3RKaZ83qQHQSNGI5GgMIExr1ZyeM11VRedHZHknhG5jmfF8i0HRlEMaY4Qr-5imhWELp-HWmBSRw60b-EOF3WxvVBWS_BViPI4Zptqg%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01b12d99f2304f2887c420d58101485d&_e=QFYbbwrokluUF-iEX4UDYqvwlHCmpz9dZGrzL0XppzhuwMth2DCdWhZnjDvYYILqaW-B_g7G5V5rO5R6a9MgzadzfbpUMi3PD5FjDKrJ13UvKGjwngNS55QDy8buVWsv8YWaMSz4N2QcQheMs50qB5_Qdja7sYejuSeB71JLgsWxPptd80jqEzGCcYKj7cNfGPdaudgAAFdfron2EhUeqOTZ3anBjp4wVuRwAeb5PPUf_xLs9evalVFNgvyFAAM0LEbNWMD7uN_fSJ5juLeB5WMJShoNyPBu9LtbY7am2fcUvYeH9baOda5ETvJSS-o7MMW-8EVYfvkNwvmMIZ9bq37syBVfaQco1LPXUijqkfSvkgwJvVHyRejuzucgGn9rG-YUPunqTG97yuUwLswXToZtpctJU8VQoACNR4OQl7VwxkXpTL-Rcz3fRqigr2mYORUtiGKv6ovLUKy_gznK-A%3D%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox, **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01b12d99f2304f2887c420d58101485d&_e=QFYbbwrokluUF-iEX4UDYqvwlHCmpz9dZGrzL0XppzhuwMth2DCdWhZnjDvYYILqaW-B_g7G5V5rO5R6a9MgzadzfbpUMi3PD5FjDKrJ13UvKGjwngNS55QDy8buVWsv8YWaMSz4N2QcQheMs50qB5_Qdja7sYejuSeB71JLgsWxPptd80jqEzGCcYKj7cNfGPdaudgAAFdfron2EhUeqOTZ3anBjp4wVuRwAeb5PPUf_xLs9evalVFNgvyFAAM0ErjHBd5zSR3t9kiSPT6sJYiZ9ZoUhnQXgCCfsdUanOxPQSOLjWc8mL6CxBOjEm4MTdEaCButn-Pt852ICGxWx3jlq7u93MHO30WsHmGhLwoi86HwDeQRY0btrqPch7rKjEjxOX5vVeoB68OywF8en2SUdVQIT7zjekmEwb7_uO88MTZKPBs2rjasJQxaX1OBjOuwYpadCk6hhH5zODT9Mg%3D%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service – along with my security clearance – to run for Congress](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01b12d99f2304f2887c420d58101485d&_e=QFYbbwrokluUF-iEX4UDYqvwlHCmpz9dZGrzL0XppzhuwMth2DCdWhZnjDvYYILqaW-B_g7G5V5rO5R6a9MgzadzfbpUMi3PD5FjDKrJ13UvKGjwngNS55QDy8buVWsv8YWaMSz4N2QcQheMs50qB5_Qdja7sYejuSeB71JLgsWxPptd80jqEzGCcYKj7cNfGPdaudgAAFdfron2EhUeqOTZ3anBjp4wVuRwAeb5PPUf_xLs9evalVFNgvyFAAM0ymzVOKmy__LqZ3A5xt7EPwEIsJBpmrFkarD9Sf-Wk2h--58D3QnUB_dJl7NCctVA6jCEi81aPbPR2GLAJ2KXLc07XJgcV9FLOPhMnGbue77dPhU16-UlSdTmHOK3Xoc42exmDXAw0EZ3eYiBtISXH4jvfO7qriMFUlWYIVvCtLYdp9NGWxLLXsYozyQttSr5AYiOn67a7AM2Lbc0882Hwg%3D%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01b12d99f2304f2887c420d58101485d&_e=QFYbbwrokluUF-iEX4UDYqvwlHCmpz9dZGrzL0XppzhuwMth2DCdWhZnjDvYYILqaW-B_g7G5V5rO5R6a9MgzadzfbpUMi3PD5FjDKrJ13UvKGjwngNS55QDy8buVWsv8YWaMSz4N2QcQheMs50qB5_Qdja7sYejuSeB71JLgsWxPptd80jqEzGCcYKj7cNfGPdaudgAAFdfron2EhUeqOTZ3anBjp4wVuRwAeb5PPUf_xLs9evalVFNgvyFAAM0XHH_4okHETpPHRv4bsziP8R3DUDzXFaXMcB4ZctpZxqqXfHfoqFIkh4jI1GgFQjNQNJFgwREkm6jUjb4kDfZ-PNBprDKV_Y7Q8sz-_49GZQLU9v4TSVq-8Pd7XvQlUOy2KSjw7kHTdpznU8H5r_1t0sfLaMPKGbl59RomtL_UyPKxNAjVn_CfxN9FzPkIXe3jpnDkqqiUPSAVxdxGVeGbA%3D%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ – along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me – even in the worst of times – that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.
| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01b12d99f2304f2887c420d58101485d&_e=QFYbbwrokluUF-iEX4UDYqvwlHCmpz9dZGrzL0XppzhuwMth2DCdWhZnjDvYYILqaW-B_g7G5V5rO5R6a9MgzadzfbpUMi3PD5FjDKrJ13UvKGjwngNS55QDy8buVWsv8YWaMSz4N2QcQheMs50qB5_Qdja7sYejuSeB71JLgsWxPptd80jqEzGCcYKj7cNfGPdaudgAAFdfron2EhUeqOTZ3anBjp4wVuRwAeb5PPUf_xLs9evalVFNgvyFAAM0PWpaZVsjFa2Hs_mvs3xoFptSwgt6rLRmi0XBybrtcOHXxRoFlKqH4iQE65Y_BzYJlhbtzDnFDrC6hbc6lqK-0sAGVYJ1E0GmBBHb0DwQ391FTMMuVyEZL8UsxikMnVz9UynJ8MiSJmn3vCkXRIORUogipesLYEw7s4bgpGPb_KiGmMZVEkxmFrILx6DInKk4M4sMhyv2kGL81VXSAFDZ3A%3D%3D)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were premeditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

clean_body: For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountableToday I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox, I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades – along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me – even in the worst of times – that our freedom isn't free at all. We have to fight for it. | Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason At the time of the Benghazi attacks, Hillary Clinton knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were premeditated by an al-Qaeda ally. . | | Creating good, family-supporting jobs that provide living wages where workers are respected is critical to Wisconsin’s future.

Sadly, just over four years ago, Ron Johnson cheered while Scott Walker’s government wasted our taxpayer money with a Foxconn deal that turned out to be a disaster for working people while rewarding a foreign corporation with our hard-earned dollars.

[Unlike Scott Walker and Ron Johnson, I have a record of fighting for good-paying jobs and even helped save a paper mill in Appleton. Sign here if you agree that our government should invest in creating good jobs — not in enriching corporations with political influence.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33776646/299910545/-811259537?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_210809_1_1&refcode2=c6bdfe47-37f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmJkZmU0Ny0zN2Y5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAgSLvChrKnfNyLdXJ9VzDIX6RdVarZFxof9Y3SaJ-M=&emci=d1a886e3-36f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6bdfe47-37f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33776656/299910550/-811259537?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_210809_1_1&refcode2=c6bdfe47-37f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmJkZmU0Ny0zN2Y5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAgSLvChrKnfNyLdXJ9VzDIX6RdVarZFxof9Y3SaJ-M=&emci=d1a886e3-36f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6bdfe47-37f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)

The Foxconn deal began with a lie and would have ended up costing $4,500,000,000 — 50% more than anticipated and approximately $1,774 per household.

Despite state and local governments spending $400 million on land for a promised manufacturing campus, it was never even built at all!

To make matters worse, Foxconn only created 13% of the jobs they initially promised — a horrible return on investment for Wisconsin taxpayers. Even a think tank funded by the Koch brothers concluded that taxpayers would have lost $20 billion in future economic growth if the government proceeded with the subsidies it promised.

Foxconn is a perfect example of the governing philosophy of people like Ron Johnson: give boondoggles to rich foreign corporations instead of investing in good made-in-Wisconsin manufacturing.

[Friend, add your name here if you agree that our elected officials should try to create quality jobs for Wisconsinites instead of lying to reward powerful special interests!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33776660/299910561/-811259537?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_210809_1_1&refcode2=c6bdfe47-37f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmJkZmU0Ny0zN2Y5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAgSLvChrKnfNyLdXJ9VzDIX6RdVarZFxof9Y3SaJ-M=&emci=d1a886e3-36f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6bdfe47-37f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)

Onward,

Tom

clean_body: | | Creating good, family-supporting jobs that provide living wages where workers are respected is critical to Wisconsin’s future. Sadly, just over four years ago, Ron Johnson cheered while Scott Walker’s government wasted our taxpayer money with a Foxconn deal that turned out to be a disaster for working people while rewarding a foreign corporation with our hard-earned dollars. | | The Foxconn deal began with a lie and would have ended up costing $4,500,000,000 — 50% more than anticipated and approximately $1,774 per household. Despite state and local governments spending $400 million on land for a promised manufacturing campus, it was never even built at all! To make matters worse, Foxconn only created 13% of the jobs they initially promised — a horrible return on investment for Wisconsin taxpayers. Even a think tank funded by the Koch brothers concluded that taxpayers would have lost $20 billion in future economic growth if the government proceeded with the subsidies it promised. Foxconn is a perfect example of the governing philosophy of people like Ron Johnson: give boondoggles to rich foreign corporations instead of investing in good made-in-Wisconsin manufacturing. Onward, Tom | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

name: Roger Roth
subject: Inflation Survey – Response Requested!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roth for Wisconsin [Please click here to unsubscribe](http://links
body:
How is inflation hurting your family's bottom line? [](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=ab07fc5280404ddeae0a892dbc5c9f45&_e=EbzIfvWsSNtvwL3C8CZbyn74Ca_WbmPvUdoF-mXVaDHPn80SBJLK_dkdSGX7MBJeJM5KjWyudBMsqHRg0MPqgXgSH1gHtgSc7aPxW7W-P6aW9dBL8cabzqbrCFicEo8OVACvNNppupa8uiFYYb5UJ_SpP3fNjvLzqkc1fOJshfUIeknz72X9ngaxCN5aLtceJG9MyJvZxWynbiwKYsKfUQHWwZr2PUZvxtjFntYvpefjhDMhmVxAbPlHqP-bPvCO9CW24qDwDoReePFlZD1s65Uv8tPzarB3MZ43kZ9bWw0%3D) Friend, I have written A LOT about budgets lately... You expect your government to live within its means, and that's exactly what Republicans did with our conservative balanced budget. But family budgets are just as important. Prices are rising on everything from gas to groceries, and it's threatening to undo the progress we've made here in Wisconsin. [TELL MADISON >>
IS INFLATION HURTING YOUR FAMILY?](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=ab07fc5280404ddeae0a892dbc5c9f45&_e=EbzIfvWsSNtvwL3C8CZbyn74Ca_WbmPvUdoF-mXVaDHPn80SBJLK_dkdSGX7MBJeJM5KjWyudBMsqHRg0MPqgV4j3ZvtCNyi3c5nPcfghpJzE03yMP6NwSb_mesubrJPLa43C8j0yGoFGfH2krYofu_afz7U2evnTUDYMo_-jJwAQQ9nXcJ6ZomrGFKWXOMwBR5kVhsTSuoQcB8fNvgY4r0t_HiGX0pzY9wwvNdlZIAvYIgPkWilap8tOsGEJBcYoPC1s42E4R-ZHGOoBwHOrMEF07d6UDGuxdThh5Xm2jU%3D) **Gas, groceries, housing, back-to-school shopping... EVERYTHING costs more this year.** Inflation is a government-created problem, caused by big-spending bureaucrats who would rather keep you home than let America work. In Wisconsin, that means families are facing tough choices as the bills grow bigger and the paychecks don't. **[Help me make Madison understand by signing my runaway inflation petition.](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=ab07fc5280404ddeae0a892dbc5c9f45&_e=EbzIfvWsSNtvwL3C8CZbyn74Ca_WbmPvUdoF-mXVaDHPn80SBJLK_dkdSGX7MBJeJM5KjWyudBMsqHRg0MPqgbxINXUMQaISLyedC88cq834_bTV3Xyl1Zo-Au48vTTWYrzN8TNzQyMTodiW0ZickbOT_JRkiUmtP6GPCGjTuqI1AG-NkfLv91NvVZENnbkRSmHEQV5yHlL0w-y0ybTkL8rTFL8JgsvlhuwpQnHMhhvaCfC7ECaa4XrJjFCmg3LfO7wK3zg-4c4LG-UD3551fsBudDJOG5Ecg7UxOsgQeh4%3D) ** Let our leaders in Madison know exactly how inflation is hurting your family's bottom line. Thanks, Roger Roth [RESPONSE REQUESTED BEFORE MIDNIGHT](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=ab07fc5280404ddeae0a892dbc5c9f45&_e=EbzIfvWsSNtvwL3C8CZbyn74Ca_WbmPvUdoF-mXVaDHPn80SBJLK_dkdSGX7MBJeJM5KjWyudBMsqHRg0MPqgbwuVS6YCA5C6BIxajpqfA8Es8InSPyN79qWo0_P9H51l3oYDuxW2cX3Rb3KrL5Cn01TRvxbmfLa-t3_Zh-MB12vkhBBVC83TOqahjiQmJ6hCkoRn3oNbjTOp4_aq285cAgghgHp-EVPCAVXiLP3ejsOrnfbpJsHAqx-WQDriXKDix5vnoLMi69a97sf8aaObdlLyVc3D3ZV4Nnld4fum4w%3D) Paid for by Roth for Wisconsin [Please click here to unsubscribe](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_s=ab07fc5280404ddeae0a892dbc5c9f45&_t=-7vfFocxTMyBIFJdKbLBoy4gQpgTeulLqmtQk78Wb1LEX8Qv-2Xya6sJznKQ0XVSv9GjhRcNKmQNUVHf-37tJ1rxQyWE5XxLteBckrx83CPyzsl0N0-LSIP2-MJsCKWF1AaKg1rE0kivS43YH9j0M3rTS5pun_CBopM0YqBzb_M%3D) [**Learn More**](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=ab07fc5280404ddeae0a892dbc5c9f45&_e=EbzIfvWsSNtvwL3C8CZbymWizVSXXw-cwDXQKFrESh5-8TdOKH3AfSx2dMEGrdtO9KkqDIvhAgEhopolNl3HF8TZTuBOtkZNWRsK-EzZb7Xxf4Psims0Ni_jVv_mzzmM869VjK_qGLDoGTdKt43jAhD5SzFH1HKiO17MnCRaWWFf0CCUB_WxD9U0I0qhjNkXmAS-hhC6fiIl7m3X2g0w484tE9g1v2pETiA4eLQOnk7klt8GkH89xEbx058w960k1dO3OP5WsU1NGmmbxSAqRQ%3D%3D)

You expect your government to live within its means, and that's exactly what Republicans did with our conservative balanced budget. But family budgets are just as important. Prices are rising on everything from gas to groceries, and it's threatening to undo the progress we've made here in Wisconsin. Gas, groceries, housing, back-to-school shopping... EVERYTHING costs more this year. Inflation is a government-created problem, caused by big-spending bureaucrats who would rather keep you home than let America work. name: Team Nikki
subject: "Governor Who?"
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

When he was asked about Governor DeSantis’ pandemic response last week, President Biden asked, “Governor Who?” Check it out:

DeSantis’ absence during COVID-19 is gaining national attention--and for good reason. Over the weekend, even Republican Senator Bill Cassidy called him out for opposing masks in school.

Team, EVERYONE is fed up with DeSantis right now. Nikki is the one candidate who can defeat him next year, and we need your help to get it done. Click here to chip in now and support our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/desantis-gov-who]

Here’s the other piece: while DeSantis travels the country raising money instead of tackling COVID in Florida, Nikki has stepped up to fill the void. Millions of Floridians are tuning in to her daily COVID updates.

Nikki is already doing the work of Governor--and after she wins next year, we’ll have a leader who puts us first at every turn.

But team, we need your help to get the job done. Please click here to chip in now and help us defeat DeSantis next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/desantis-gov-who]

Thanks,

Team Nikki

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Murder rate up 800%
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon

This is going to be one of the biggest, most expensive Senate races in 2022, friend. Republicans know that control of the Senate hinges on this seat, and they will do and spend whatever it takes to win. **Mitch McConnell's dark money allies are already spending millions on attack ads against Maggie, and there are millions more on the way.** While Republicans rely on dark money super PACs and outside interest groups to fund their campaign, we are proudly people-powered, with an average online donation size of $27. But recently, our grassroots donors have started to taper off. And in a race this big, that's bad news. On top of everything, we're behind on our August goal, and if we don't hit it, it could cost us our Senate majority. **[Can you rush a donation of $5 today to help us reach our August goal and build a strong campaign foundation? We’re going to be honest with you, Peter.

clean_body: We can’t afford to be complacent, Peter. | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . | | We’re going to be honest with you, Peter. The 2020 Election was very, very close in the Battleground State of North Carolina. The Democrats smell blood in the water, and they’re moving fast to attack. They’ve made North Carolina one of their TOP TARGETS in the Midterm Elections, and if we’re not careful they’ll seize our Republican-held U.S. Senate Seat. NORTH CAROLINA BATTLEGROUND FUND EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $35 or more | | | | | | | If the Democrats seize the upper hand in North Carolina, it would cripple our chances of winning back the House and Senate Majorities in 2022. That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we have the Complete and Total Support of every Republican Patriot (including you, Peter). | | | | | Thank you. NCGOP Digital Team Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

Tom wants to know what you think, friend. Tom came to Congress to solve problems, work across the aisle, and make sure Arizonans have a voice in Washington. With your input, we can gain a better understanding of how Tom can best serve you and your family. | ********** These surveys help us set an agenda that reflects your priorities. Your responses are so important for knowing what you think! Thanks for making your voice heard. TomOHalleran.com Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

name: Chief James Craig
subject: This police chief saved Detroit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102486:6wsK7SlNY:m:1:3253819041:4D9598E4C63A4EB12F547B37125BF55A:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102486:6wsK7SlNY:m:1:3253819041:4D9598E4C63A4EB12F547B37125BF55A:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102486:6wsK7SlNY:m:1:3253819041:4D9598E4C63A4EB12F547B37125BF55A:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102486:6wsK7SlNY:m:1:3253819041:4D9598E4C63A4EB12F547B37125BF55A:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102486:6wsK7SlNY:m:1:3253819041:4D9598E4C63A4EB12F547B37125BF55A:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102486:6wsK7SlNY:m:1:3253819041:4D9598E4C63A4EB12F547B37125BF55A:r)

[**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102486:6wsK7SlNY:m:1:3253819041:4D9598E4C63A4EB12F547B37125BF55A:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102486:6wsK7SlNY:m:1:3253819041:4D9598E4C63A4EB12F547B37125BF55A:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102487:6wsK7SlNY:m:1:3253819041:4D9598E4C63A4EB12F547B37125BF55A:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58102488:6wsK7SlNY:m:1:3253819041:4D9598E4C63A4EB12F547B37125BF55A:r)
