clean_body: | | Peter, Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan... But not Detroit. Why? I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn. See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs. I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened. The police retreated, and let their city burn. Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens. But there's more to the "why?" than that. When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. I was the first in that day, leading from the front. Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, Detroit did not burn. That's the why. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that? Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership. I don't see much of that out there. So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican. I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain. And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values. And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!" I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth. Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values. When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time. And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly. Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen. Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. Chief James Craig Former Detroit Police Chief P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: Contributions to Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle. | | | Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 | | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. | | Folks, It’s that time of the year again! Families across Nevada are eager for the new school year -- but I know that some may be proceeding with caution due to the rise of the COVID-19 Delta variant. As a parent myself, I know how important it is for both students and parents to feel confident heading into the school year. I want to be clear: **I am committed to making sure every student in Nevada has a smooth, safe, and successful school year.** The well-being of our students is my top priority, which is why I released requirements and recommendations for all K-12 students and staff that follow CDC safety guidelines -- including **masking, testing, and other strategies to slow the spread of COVID-19**. Children under 12 are still not eligible for the vaccine, so it’s _important that we put practices in place that safeguard the health of each and every student._ I’ve also taken steps to ensure that Nevada's public schools receive the attention and funding that they need to thrive this school year. We know how big of an impact adequate funding has on student achievement, which is why I enacted the Pupil-Centered Funding Plan which **updates the public school funding formula and allocates $257 million dollars in 2022 to boost base funding.** I’m not just talking the talk -- **I****’ve also continued to donate my Governor salary to Nevada public schools** because I truly believe that our schools shape our future — and every student in Nevada deserves a chance to be part of that future. This time of the year is always exciting and full of new possibilities. I’m inspired by the resilience of Nevada’s educators and students and I can’t wait to see what they’re able to accomplish this school year. Thank you, Steve Sisolak [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yAEtdQA2buKQtEzq8epopFdtekabESzAFRI5BnH60dfsSuA608LcvKr9sJtmR3bJ05uf9rev8lqCNPLXC0J4zvqNW29Csci5g04E2-o37X0wvbEgnX8E1eb_qShABnpUA6OqrcxQLzRWwPDzh-p61AcTXm9nZWNfLb2dHfroKodd3HSEagVuwwrvr4pvkIBqtasK0zg2I2k4xKHxmzcmqhTKssVoxwTJ9yvv9pTsNjFgE90XWswSZhaWABGaonNmNqaTVbSP6zt0mmRr7P7pkN7_K_XKC4fNoweNMSXt1FyAjGVNnSsQf_ckHKpUelz9T3iW7F5A8FkdZ0-38V1WA3oiPhR5Cu3-VxLhFP2ncwkZPjH-9PbxU7Q1AKrifP7IoIhFUVmx2pwiQczk31OhgONuET7VkfIs3oPjbG2HgZrVkgZ_si6hsE383gFN-UkKwtVaDsv_hhFi8Y_OkuKm_vpObNDCzAZT07YcM9mpl5tcKS2GWYlRNwdW6riZzamapGbwlxAQFpVcFnUWqADIYqGWIV61Omc1cDqophrdbfM1DIM4TiNRj-hiI6linjhApdE8hlOT1g7F57a3274jdazi3xAEa9uyuNbVesZdOwpDdWgkbSeXsDIMkEfme4tyNJnu1apmjLeZsWGpAJkmy-/3eb/3NA30sqQRke9PvtR8jjrwA/h1/-KZb1XsHrjv5HNGN7WFMNxJZyNkrIVHFeXWumm9oYoc) P.S. name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Big update: Momentum is on our side
body:
This is just the start of our campaign. We’re building an unprecedented grassroots team and a relentless travel schedule to talk with activists and voters.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T45dG42fmc-NYNWdAwJ3bmMw0lY7ik1fYkd1UIL9RrL5IBJBYJTVm9BuZGWeiLlppPsdsPuJ1kRiZ2Ay83iKS44PFNsmi8VznDa2uKW1TKMgW7Mgjm7T0i-KDSNE_mNP27LCchxgEB7uRTjyL52z_df3v4YM7DsGtLlOc9N2mOrGGFFA0P7lBg==&c=pwL47dhSpP7Boma4-nCIHMJskl0eFUFtUp_LQCK-Mri53Kg0WXvdTg==&ch=GEVs5LPisCVWZmeBsD33tD4KUW-U3sElZowJ0_KV-VcZak1-1Ynvkg==)
---
| Peter,
We have some major news. Thanks to our generous supporters, we SMASHED our end of the month fundraising goal! But that's not even the best news...
Thanks to your support, we reserved $9.9 million in broadcast and cable television time for the 2022 election cycle, with $2.9 million reserved in 2021 alone!
That means we'll be on the air, talking to voters, until the May 2022 primary.
We are taking our message of strong borders, defending the unborn, an America-First foreign policy, and standing up for the Constitution straight to the voters.
Our campaign will serve as an unrelenting voice for liberty this election.
This is just the start of our campaign. We're building an unprecedented grassroots team and an ambitious travel schedule to talk with activists and voters.
We need to spread the word that this is the most important race of our lifetimes.

* The Left threatens the very fabric of America
* Runaway spending
* Inflation
* A crisis at the border
* The federal takeover of elections
* Unelected bureaucrats telling us how to live our lives
* A culture war that seeks to divide us along racial lines

That's why we need conservatives in Ohio and across the country to make a commitment to our victory.
[Please consider making a donation of $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or even more by clicking here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T45dG42fmc-NYNWdAwJ3bmMw0lY7ik1fYkd1UIL9RrL5IBJBYJTVm9BuZGWeiLlppPsdsPuJ1kRiZ2Ay83iKS44PFNsmi8VznDa2uKW1TKMgW7Mgjm7T0i-KDSNE_mNP27LCchxgEB7uRTjyL52z_df3v4YM7DsGtLlOc9N2mOrGGFFA0P7lBg==&c=pwL47dhSpP7Boma4-nCIHMJskl0eFUFtUp_LQCK-Mri53Kg0WXvdTg==&ch=GEVs5LPisCVWZmeBsD33tD4KUW-U3sElZowJ0_KV-VcZak1-1Ynvkg==)
Thank you for being a part of our team,
---
|
---
| Mike Gibbons Candidate for US Senate
---
| |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T45dG42fmc-NYNWdAwJ3bmMw0lY7ik1fYkd1UIL9RrL5IBJBYJTVm2A8BKDndrqNW2Kc2QCcfaoKVosr6_aNUxED4Q1mVAa_OzOUoDCWtUeqROSPooNEkDWfj9BINQhvLpUNjfasvLC2V0Y0cwkEXQ==&c=pwL47dhSpP7Boma4-nCIHMJskl0eFUFtUp_LQCK-Mri53Kg0WXvdTg==&ch=GEVs5LPisCVWZmeBsD33tD4KUW-U3sElZowJ0_KV-VcZak1-1Ynvkg==)

name: Ras Smith
subject: Announcing my K-12 education plan →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
This is a long, but important, email announcing my plan to get Iowa’s public schools back to #1 again. Team | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33784238/299939173/-858979165?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210809education_rs_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjk4MTU3Mi01MGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LEqO54o_-hMOC0aTJyOdfMUfeW2aRZ6xZZnMjFTlde0=)
---
Team, **[This is a long, but important, email announcing my plan to get Iowa’s public schools back to #1 again. Will you read my plan below and then sign on in support?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33784239/299939174/141027360?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210809education_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjk4MTU3Mi01MGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LEqO54o_-hMOC0aTJyOdfMUfeW2aRZ6xZZnMjFTlde0=&emci=51981572-50f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=52981572-50f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)** Education has always been central to Iowa's heritage. Our state quarter reads "Foundation in Education," recognizing the fact that Iowa was once home to the best public schools in the country. Our public schools are the backbone of our communities, a catalyst for economic mobility and, at our best, a source of pride for our state. Right now, there’s a major disconnect between politicians and our classrooms. We can change that, but only if we elect leaders who prioritize our students and value our educators. **As the Ranking Member of the House Education Committee** , I know that students must ride the bus for hours and hours every day due to the GOP underfunding schools, which only accelerates rural school consolidation. Educators continue to move out of Iowa to states where they are finding their profession valued and retirement not constantly threatened. **As a former counselor, coach, and student support worker in Iowa public schools** , I’ve seen firsthand the impact of Governor Reynolds’ policies that benefit private interests at the expense of our educators, students, and families. **And as the husband of a special education teacher, and a father to two young daughters** , education is part of my everyday life. I want my daughters, and every child in our state, to learn in schools that once again lead the nation. **We can get back to #1, and ensure that Iowa students are globally competitive.** Our history and heritage in Iowa shows us the way. In Iowa’s early days, our leaders prioritized establishing a school in every township, and they prioritized paying for it. **[As a leader on the Education committee, I’ve been a champion for our public schools. Will you sign on in support of my plan to get Iowa schools back to #1 in the nation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33784240/299939175/141027360?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210809education_rs_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjk4MTU3Mi01MGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LEqO54o_-hMOC0aTJyOdfMUfeW2aRZ6xZZnMjFTlde0=&emci=51981572-50f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=52981572-50f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)** Here’s a summary of my K-12 Education Plan:
* **Prioritizing Students and Families:** All Iowa students deserve a fair opportunity to receive a globally competitive education, regardless of zip code, background, or parents’ income.

* **Empowering Educators:** We ask so much of our educators, and yet many are left without the support they need, or have mandates placed on them that make teaching and learning less effective. We can empower our educators by allowing for more curriculum inclusion and freedom, reducing mandated testing, and more.

* **Public Dollars for Public Schools:** Governor Reynolds has doubled her efforts to privatize education in our state. But we know that a majority of Iowans oppose legislation like the bill signed this past session to make the creation of private charter schools easier. We need to prioritize public dollars for public schools.

We can once again have the best schools in the country, but only if we work together to elect leaders who are willing to put in the work to help us get there. [**Whether you’re a parent, student, teacher or someone who cares deeply about the future of our state, I invite you to come as you are and join our efforts to get Iowa public schools back to #1. Add your name to join us and support my plan here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33784241/299939176/141027360?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210809education_rs_full_xx_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjk4MTU3Mi01MGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LEqO54o_-hMOC0aTJyOdfMUfeW2aRZ6xZZnMjFTlde0=&emci=51981572-50f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=52981572-50f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33784242/299939177/141027360?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210809education_rs_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjk4MTU3Mi01MGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LEqO54o_-hMOC0aTJyOdfMUfeW2aRZ6xZZnMjFTlde0=&emci=51981572-50f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=52981572-50f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)
---

clean_body: This is a long, but important, email announcing my plan to get Iowa’s public schools back to #1 again. Team | = Team, Education has always been central to Iowa's heritage. Our state quarter reads "Foundation in Education," recognizing the fact that Iowa was once home to the best public schools in the country. Our public schools are the backbone of our communities, a catalyst for economic mobility and, at our best, a source of pride for our state. Right now, there’s a major disconnect between politicians and our classrooms. We can change that, but only if we elect leaders who prioritize our students and value our educators. As the Ranking Member of the House Education Committee , I know that students must ride the bus for hours and hours every day due to the GOP underfunding schools, which only accelerates rural school consolidation. Educators continue to move out of Iowa to states where they are finding their profession valued and retirement not constantly threatened. As a former counselor, coach, and student support worker in Iowa public schools , I’ve seen firsthand the impact of Governor Reynolds’ policies that benefit private interests at the expense of our educators, students, and families. And as the husband of a special education teacher, and a father to two young daughters , education is part of my everyday life. I want my daughters, and every child in our state, to learn in schools that once again lead the nation. We can get back to #1, and ensure that Iowa students are globally competitive. Our history and heritage in Iowa shows us the way. In Iowa’s early days, our leaders prioritized establishing a school in every township, and they prioritized paying for it. Here’s a summary of my K-12 Education Plan: Prioritizing Students and Families: All Iowa students deserve a fair opportunity to receive a globally competitive education, regardless of zip code, background, or parents’ income. Empowering Educators: We ask so much of our educators, and yet many are left without the support they need, or have mandates placed on them that make teaching and learning less effective. We can empower our educators by allowing for more curriculum inclusion and freedom, reducing mandated testing, and more. Public Dollars for Public Schools:** Governor Reynolds has doubled her efforts to privatize education in our state. But we know that a majority of Iowans oppose legislation like the bill signed this past session to make the creation of private charter schools easier. We need to prioritize public dollars for public schools. We can once again have the best schools in the country, but only if we work together to elect leaders who are willing to put in the work to help us get there. | Thanks for reading and supporting this campaign, Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. Box 1651 Waterloo, IA 50704 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_

For America,

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: How about these new COVID mandates?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
As we continue to navigate COVID, we need consistent and calm leadership, not constantly changing guidance and fear mongering. I oppose government m Friend, As we continue to navigate COVID, we need consistent and calm leadership, not constantly changing guidance and fear mongering. I oppose government mask mandates, vaccine mandates and vaccine passports because our government needs to trust its citizens to do the right thing. The Legislature has blocked state-level mandates, and I’m currently fighting in court to protect your right to challenge local mandates. I believe we MUST respect individual liberties and trust Kansans to make decisions for themselves and their families. [**Will you join me and sign your name to support individual liberties?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=4d8ad6dd193549648a7cee65d59fdcc6&_e=zWTICp9V4UcIP4b86UwdUVh11R2TPwOUCbCHexIx8plWnOP724awlUeh-MLnCko83z_g4nro9Rxpa09KmV0eQEMVzvCfZPAP2eKfrol-sUUkotz4DpyGkx199ywJthn-_skXAru5HIQkM89XpyimI6-JJBe7L5biMht4qFjJhUC_g6VRx_nSnjp1JBbGZsM6wtYJHVQIwP80rGw_pXD3bFjeA68QjuA074weAqwD5OCge_jNkWeQ3lMf254W-k6yuHjg29ar89pKmY4sAxOPcnKB_foOSfh9WL96zAIR7Bx8-w6wpIKojyfmhoM_Qpw_5ZC2PVvwnv9JpkJKMHbiAwzZBW091ePTr1xvE6S9DYak7VO-bnjZ3jgTVy0w2QSpKuneFCu-34EREztEDzhqYf5IQoQJkjBFdOHaGCrrgISQrH5P5Neqzqou79VP5tDR) [**SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=4d8ad6dd193549648a7cee65d59fdcc6&_e=zWTICp9V4UcIP4b86UwdUVh11R2TPwOUCbCHexIx8plWnOP724awlUeh-MLnCko83z_g4nro9Rxpa09KmV0eQEMVzvCfZPAP2eKfrol-sUUkotz4DpyGkx199ywJthn-_skXAru5HIQkM89XpyimI6-JJBe7L5biMht4qFjJhUC_g6VRx_nSnjp1JBbGZsM6wtYJHVQIwP80rGw_pXD3bGhLqr_RKlxeuZRIDUS-WLxaDkUXxX98b4-FByVErcsG_NO2Vx7cW2Z2mbdnpjgGjv80kUmzHb3XK3ieJ2ERbybqAeih32Gh4XSRwwsfWMjy5q9bhFZnaQbP9_Ngccq-tULYOmwkcFmqz8OLYQ3-UkwyQrCQlYOJDZ5nQlWc8utUPtyWhD0kGxLF8AgE0pX2M5wRlbyicd4xLPBQqbDf5yF4O4TAYqsdt5TNL378RpPq) I’m tired of Joe Biden and Laura Kelly’s lack of leadership on this issue. I’m sure you are too. [**Sign now to stand against more government control of our daily lives.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=4d8ad6dd193549648a7cee65d59fdcc6&_e=zWTICp9V4UcIP4b86UwdUVh11R2TPwOUCbCHexIx8plWnOP724awlUeh-MLnCko83z_g4nro9Rxpa09KmV0eQEMVzvCfZPAP2eKfrol-sUUkotz4DpyGkx199ywJthn-_skXAru5HIQkM89XpyimI6-JJBe7L5biMht4qFjJhUC_g6VRx_nSnjp1JBbGZsM6wtYJHVQIwP80rGw_pXD3bIgi_DCwokra4hX5fgtmIxDDGIb4tgbdj5Us24-DhfKs5CSkwJH7q68QRX-miF0PZ5yTorTOajiNwrny0zW_iLnoyQY8DhlmMd33g2yL0LOD8LfcgkQuiqUFd9TcSN8ZZPXrXW_HnDwSTnq9lz_W5mlHd0XwETCrABlh_7vnQU_BjtBrsCxIwZHlyAjez1_WzIS9LsW34mEmjW3JS9aj5C6loKTdPGI5tOSFf1shMcOO) Kansans need a leader who understands our values and respects our personal liberties. | [RSVP NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33784819/299940844/-447086267?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTQxMDdhZC01MmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0vBydyhY9mLqPSz374HelG9peqfeJy3tS6tT_CYLY0=&emci=6c9fade9-31f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2e4107ad-52f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=14239920)

We don’t have any time to spare because gubernatorial recall ballots will start arriving in Californians’ mailboxes in just a few days. It’s absolutely critical that we defeat this baseless recall, and with us by his side I’m confident Governor Newsom can stand up to these partisan attacks. [_**I’ll be there, can I count on you to join me Wednesday evening?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33784820/299940845/-447086267?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTQxMDdhZC01MmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0vBydyhY9mLqPSz374HelG9peqfeJy3tS6tT_CYLY0=&emci=6c9fade9-31f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2e4107ad-52f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=14239920)

_Sara Jacobs_

Parents agree that they want their kids to have access to quality education, but they are deeply divided on what that looks like in California. **One of the most controversial aspects of getting kids back into school is the debate over whether the government should impose mandatory mask mandates on ALL students ages two and older. ** The rules have been shifting constantly over the summer, and parents are speaking out on both sides of the issue after Gavin Newsom declared that masks would be required, but also that it will be up to local school districts to decide how to enforce it. **Kevin wants to know what you think, Peter. Are mask mandates harmful to our children?** [**TAKE THE POLL >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e11900b4d61a4c36/10c107f1847b7267c3d6b838967d376c/34943) We’ve come a long way in dealing with this virus. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Alexandria’s top three tips for having conversations with someone who may be hesitant to get vaccinated.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The reasons some are reluctant to get vaccinated are varied, but we know that getting vaccinated is the number one way we will get ourselves out of this pandemic and ensure a healthy society for decades to come.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210809-2329-header&t=1&akid=2329%2E2526796%2EWKNDVc)
A little over half of the U.S. population is now fully vaccinated — that’s over 166 million people.
**However, that means half of the country is still unvaccinated.** The reasons some are reluctant to get vaccinated are varied, but we know that getting vaccinated is _the number one way_ we will get ourselves out of this pandemic and ensure a healthy society for decades to come.
We’ve overcome pandemics time and time again — polio, influenza, and chicken pox were all brought under control after a majority of the population was vaccinated against these diseases. COVID-19 will be no different.
**Last week, Alexandria hopped on Instagram to share some tips for having conversations with loved ones in your life who may be hesitant to get vaccinated. We wanted to share those with you:**
1. **Find their number one reason for hesitancy.**
There’s a lot of misinformation out there about the COVID-19 vaccines, but there’s usually one main issue a person may have heard that’s giving them hesitancy. Empathize with some of those root causes. It’s totally normal to be concerned, so don’t mock people! Understand where they’re coming from. Asking follow-up questions with genuine curiosity is key.
2. **Share your personal experience with getting vaccinated.**
If someone is getting bad information, it’s likely that they might not trust traditional institutions or vetted reporting. So sending them a bunch of articles and stats in response and trying to “debate” is not going to work. Shaming someone won’t persuade them.
What people do respond to is personal stories from people they actually know. So share your story about getting vaccinated and ask them non-judgmentally if they have any questions about your experience.
3. **Offer assistance to lift any logistical barriers.**
A lot of people don’t know or don’t believe that the vaccine is actually free. Let them know it’s free (from your personal story!), offer them a ride, or show them how to make an appointment.

Now that you have the tools to have meaningful conversations about the COVID-19 vaccines, we want to know:
[What questions do you have about how to talk to your loved ones about the vaccine? Let us know by filling out our COVID-19 Vaccine Survey so we can help.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/covid-19-vaccine-survey/?source=em20210809-2329&refcode=em20210809-2329&t=2&akid=2329%2E2526796%2EWKNDVc)
**[Take our COVID-19 Vaccine Survey](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/covid-19-vaccine-survey/?source=em20210809-2329&refcode=em20210809-2329&t=3&akid=2329%2E2526796%2EWKNDVc)**
Conversations like what we described above are the best tool we have to get more people vaccinated and end this pandemic sooner. Thanks for doing your part by talking to your friends, colleagues, and loved ones about getting vaccinated.
— Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210809-2329-footer&t=4&refcode2=2329_2526796_WKNDVc&akid=2329%2E2526796%2EWKNDVc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=2329%2E2526796%2EWKNDVc) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=2329%2E2526796%2EWKNDVc) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=2329%2E2526796%2EWKNDVc)

If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=8&akid=2329%2E2526796%2EWKNDVc)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2329%2E2526796%2EWKNDVc). Mary Vought

name: Cristina =?iso-8859-1?q?Tzintz=FAn?= Ramirez
subject: Tell Congress: Immigration STAYS in the Reconciliation Package
body:
| | | Democratic leadership in Congress must hold the line and ensure a pathway to citizenship stays in the next reconciliation package.
---
| [Send message](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33785606/299943323/122959358?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhhY2VjYi01NGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPTFB2xKkc_3bVtr-UklKwXk5cgu6el2JIyoAkE_DdM=&emci=3d99f9fe-3af9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=368acecb-54f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**A pathway to citizenship means hope.**
For mothers, fathers, brothers, and sisters. For essential workers, farm workers, students, and community members. For families seeking better lives for their children. For migrants fleeing violence in their home countries. For immigrants who pay taxes every year to a country that refuses to recognize them as their own. For activists who demand our government see Dreamers as human beings instead of bargaining chips. For those just trying to survive.
**A pathway to citizenship means freedom.**
**Senate Democrats have proposed a pathway to citizenship in the next budget reconciliation package, which can bypass a GOP filibuster and pass with a simple majority vote.** We have the numbers in the Senate, and we expect passage in the House as well, but we are not out of the woods yet.
A hateful federal court ruling has partially ended the DACA program, throwing the lives of nearly 50,000 new applicants in an alarming state of limbo. **It’s clear that permanent protections are urgent and long overdue.**
[**Urge your members of Congress to ensure that a pathway to citizenship stays in the upcoming budget reconciliation package.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33785608/299943325/-1799354943?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhhY2VjYi01NGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPTFB2xKkc_3bVtr-UklKwXk5cgu6el2JIyoAkE_DdM=&emci=3d99f9fe-3af9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=368acecb-54f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
With Congress expected to go into recess later this month, we are keeping the pressure on our legislators. They must pass a budget resolution that includes a pathway to citizenship and ensure immigration reform stays in the reconciliation package for voting when they reconvene.
**This is the best chance Democrats in Congress have had in years to finally deliver hope and freedom to Dreamers, DACA recipients, and TPS holders — and this time, Republicans won’t be able to block it.** This can be a monumental win, but one we’ll only be able to accomplish with your help. Our members of Congress need to hear from you directly.
[Send a letter](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33785610/299943329/929528412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjhhY2VjYi01NGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPTFB2xKkc_3bVtr-UklKwXk5cgu6el2JIyoAkE_DdM=&emci=3d99f9fe-3af9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=368acecb-54f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172 "Sign up to text")
---
**We are fighting for a future where immigrants are empowered to live their lives with joy and pride.** No more shadows. No more fear. We are writing the next chapter of our history to celebrate the immigrant families and communities who make up the vibrant cultural fabric of this country. It all starts with your letter to Congress.
Thank you,
Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez
Executive Director
NextGen America
| **NextGen America**
268 Bush St. #2919
San Francisco CA 94104-3503. clean_body: | | | Democratic leadership in Congress must hold the line and ensure a pathway to citizenship stays in the next reconciliation package. | | | Friend, A pathway to citizenship means hope. For mothers, fathers, brothers, and sisters. For essential workers, farm workers, students, and community members. For families seeking better lives for their children. For migrants fleeing violence in their home countries. For immigrants who pay taxes every year to a country that refuses to recognize them as their own. For activists who demand our government see Dreamers as human beings instead of bargaining chips. For those just trying to survive. A pathway to citizenship means freedom. Senate Democrats have proposed a pathway to citizenship in the next budget reconciliation package, which can bypass a GOP filibuster and pass with a simple majority vote. We have the numbers in the Senate, and we expect passage in the House as well, but we are not out of the woods yet. A hateful federal court ruling has partially ended the DACA program, throwing the lives of nearly 50,000 new applicants in an alarming state of limbo. It’s clear that permanent protections are urgent and long overdue. With Congress expected to go into recess later this month, we are keeping the pressure on our legislators. They must pass a budget resolution that includes a pathway to citizenship and ensure immigration reform stays in the reconciliation package for voting when they reconvene. This is the best chance Democrats in Congress have had in years to finally deliver hope and freedom to Dreamers, DACA recipients, and TPS holders — and this time, Republicans won’t be able to block it. This can be a monumental win, but one we’ll only be able to accomplish with your help. Our members of Congress need to hear from you directly. "Sign up to text" We are fighting for a future where immigrants are empowered to live their lives with joy and pride. No more shadows. No more fear. We are writing the next chapter of our history to celebrate the immigrant families and communities who make up the vibrant cultural fabric of this country. It all starts with your letter to Congress. Thank you, Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez Executive Director NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

Fellow American,

As it turns out, ICE has been taking packed planes full of illegal migrants and dropping them all over the country.

_No court dates._

_No COVID precautions._

_No coverage from the liberal media._

The Biden administration is committing lawless acts before our eyes.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=997137608318448a9ca32259bf579b74&_e=QtViXLCw52c0w7Vr2V5zAcOd1YCYFULfMyhJe5Ocg3bAu0M2cqPOD9AjRmIWCVSasq_koyJ4MGbbnmfxNEEKplVbs_XkXc_YpkWy9aqj5K8xyXmLF3y45j9LkDxpumLXGNWiXdRv_sl7JDkS2ZTkt79aVODz6TK2pNoYKIQapYY9hgzSu0kUhgStinPZITolhJucwxVdEuV0B96immXcuP80fyxc-_3p6R4ad6Y4jqwPu-gNl85Cc_aYhmUbHGnWpqEe1L-RafSpbUmrCNlUhSgpWquujo3Neci4wcDre3AeLnejAsmXQDwIgmTo3BgGVmlrgFdoevrpsl5yz-uo4GOMzxGXklVGypGcj8ldo4I3pSRzy5J0aa1sGVtf72Z4iWqjUMWbMgWHwD8SXhCZYWsXB0Cu3XxVB2SXV9I3EuXIbshwiMGP1Pri4KmKNoyIfFOQolz6ZjpBGsBeBEe0QjTJ8HYPrL6WwF4nB-TUEEh3645_zTKBxb7FXJLFMZlOaBSnWVYsDo1QLkUl00cqEXOphtVvhnyU5CdnRp8XyIQ%3D)

So, let me get this straight - the Biden administration will not comment on ICE dropping COVID-positive migrants throughout the country, but want to mandate vaccine passports for Americans? This is exactly why I’m calling for the resignation of DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.

Further highlighting the double standard - President Biden has said he will require vaccination IDs from anyone entering the U.S. from a foreign country and he will keep the Canadian border closed, yet, our southern border is wide open to traffickers, criminals, and anyone with COVID and no ID.

It’s tyranny right before our eyes. And I won’t stand for the hypocrisy.

clean_body: Taxpayer-funded flights for illegal migrants into the U.S.? | Fellow American, As it turns out, ICE has been taking packed planes full of illegal migrants and dropping them all over the country. No court dates. No COVID precautions. No coverage from the liberal media. The Biden administration is committing lawless acts before our eyes. So, let me get this straight - the Biden administration will not comment on ICE dropping COVID-positive migrants throughout the country, but want to mandate vaccine passports for Americans? This is exactly why I’m calling for the resignation of DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. Further highlighting the double standard - President Biden has said he will require vaccination IDs from anyone entering the U.S. from a foreign country and he will keep the Canadian border closed, yet, our southern border is wide open to traffickers, criminals, and anyone with COVID and no ID. It’s tyranny right before our eyes. And I won’t stand for the hypocrisy. Fellow American, Democrats are working overtime to force America quickly down the road towards socialism. We must fight back and save our country! We can’t wait any longer. Please respond today. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jessica=20Cisneros?=
subject: Please sign your name if you believe we need to abolish corporate PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
#
The most any person can contribute to a campaign for Congress is $2,900.
That's the law.
But a gaping loophole in our campaign finance rules allows any business to open a PAC, stock it with company cash, and shell out $5,000 checks to campaigns. That's right -- corporations can donate about twice as much as people.
How is this even legal?
Last year, I ran for Congress and got out-spent by about $700,000. We lost by only 3 percent in a close race. My opponent, Henry Cuellar, was able to out-spend us because he accepted $1.5 million in PAC money -- from folks like Chevron, Exxon, GEO Group (the largest private prison company), and Koch Industries.
We need to stop allowing corporations to buy our elections and close this loophole. [**Sign your name to our petition now: abolish corporate PACs and stop letting corporations directly buy our elections.**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=c1b6daf04f&e=ed416558ef)
[Sign your name »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=65f44ecdea&e=ed416558ef)
I'm an immigration and human rights attorney. I spend my days at work trying to get immigrant families released from inhumane and cruel detention centers. Meanwhile, my opponent Henry Cuellar cashes tens of thousands of dollars in campaign checks from GEO Group, the private prison company that profits off of operating those very same detention centers.
It's a pay-to-play scheme. GEO Group knows I'm a threat to their profits if I get elected to Congress. So they pay tens of thousands of dollars to fuel Rep. Henry Cuellar's campaign. Laredo remains one of the poorest cities in Texas, but instead of helping his district he has served his wealthy donors: corporate PACs, fossil fuel companies, defense contractors and private prison profiteers.
[**It 's time to root out this corruption. Please, if you can add your name to our petition, sign on to say you support abolishing corporate PACs.**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=1aaa1c871b&e=ed416558ef)
[Sign your name »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=90213d308c&e=ed416558ef)
South Texas deserves a leader that's going to fight for their dreams as hard as they do -- without a dime of corporate PAC dollars because South Texas deserves true representation.
Thank you for adding your voice to this fight today,
Jessica Cisneros
Candidate for Texas' 28th District
Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=7873097058&e=ed416558ef&c=ff6e1d50a4). Mail us: PO Box 660, Laredo, TX 78042.

body:
| | | **MSNBC: TRUMP RAISES STAGGERING $82 MILLION -- MORE THAN ANY REPUBLICAN**
We're sick to our stomachs.

MSNBC just reported Trump has raked in an astonishing $82 MILLION this year.

That's more than ANY other Republican this year.

This can only mean one thing:

**Trump and Republicans are gearing up to buy this election -- and usher in a TOTAL GOP takeover.**

[**If we let this one-term President and his Republicans outraise our Democrats and barge back into power, we will regret it forever. We need to go on the ATTACK, close the fundraising gap, and stop Trump and his Republicans from EVER holding power again. name: John Castorani
subject: Destroying the bastards was my mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=26af5b21b25c4652b4197add6dffa8ff&_t=xsiNRjnFhJeUF64I3QmTwi-vH_qW3hS_B6EmotqTGWT5VAnurdPyG_KNBA1j7y2z0_pUlvJVNXgWJQeEgaOfO0mBJaJbSPMmfFmPLjJ0dVifUXy7G8xD4QJkq1wC86pRv-X3hRBJoFlu2_ORl-HOVNhBz8AiMjBUuSKr0Wzs9Q4%3D) | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=26af5b21b25c4652b4197add6dffa8ff&_e=oC6BiS8n0u2yI3bxurH53FCFJIjg5fktnSI_Ir3URULrJEcLBqbpIljCUwgbwMHm49VO2h32tW_pSD2otwbkp7_DiR81lPU22d_y1PviKAgRlgbmZHYEWv-hM2bsbax8ZEPcmDXEFTB0g9HdFLOz6bMFyT0S-YGnwgusjcBP01DhsD5gUSe8aF7kJLnwC7q41cv3DECD4zl0Mp9xlQFxGS4YGzOMUvxwR589WhJ1H7YrPuzhFhYsoZRWXjSZSN4Np4Kmbvo7j3mVHuqNFDG-DtdXYFT72prk4TSuhvmPa33Ux8E3y3z6p_KhzaVmzBDE8x2a4sh49BP1WUQsdtwb0agV35fLmiTFQrgX7nWIL9KuD1MpfH0uuOFVRdbM-uyox3HaJMRS6yy4_2l7LKGOdCJ-rqDCGeaI5Tcu6nc_0k9H7aipwB5KYmmadEW_asVgwHLPzt05-TuEEyg0zxhIxCA5RX_oINPocYylydIuq5w%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=26af5b21b25c4652b4197add6dffa8ff&_e=oC6BiS8n0u2yI3bxurH53FCFJIjg5fktnSI_Ir3URULrJEcLBqbpIljCUwgbwMHm49VO2h32tW_pSD2otwbkp7_DiR81lPU22d_y1PviKAgRlgbmZHYEWv-hM2bsbax8ZEPcmDXEFTB0g9HdFLOz6bMFyT0S-YGnwgusjcBP01DhsD5gUSe8aF7kJLnwC7q41cv3DECD4zl0Mp9xlQFxGS4YGzOMUvxwR589WhJ1H7YrPuzhFhYsoZRWXjSZSN4NCVZgp_s3F-RdSrq5W9HW88EqrvbX1Oy_4qoJnTPPjX7MP3PvUvdpp5tFfYuFWI3A2ClLBnzLdLKmoEm6hXvFWtq31OClIjT8MpQtQexvxh0Wh--ZkylNal4NcZu3MugQH-F6cQbKMWuhfFspaXd9g0Nn9ALJ1USDlkdsamw5aYmjSRMO8SezEBVbwmAt--L_mkf97uu_UcoflgQuCE390cgHUsUf_uCuPp3E4LqdvzA%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=26af5b21b25c4652b4197add6dffa8ff&_e=oC6BiS8n0u2yI3bxurH53FCFJIjg5fktnSI_Ir3URULrJEcLBqbpIljCUwgbwMHm49VO2h32tW_pSD2otwbkp7_DiR81lPU22d_y1PviKAgRlgbmZHYEWv-hM2bsbax8ZEPcmDXEFTB0g9HdFLOz6bMFyT0S-YGnwgusjcBP01DhsD5gUSe8aF7kJLnwC7q41cv3DECD4zl0Mp9xlQFxGS4YGzOMUvxwR589WhJ1H7YrPuzhFhYsoZRWXjSZSN4NVCZtpQkvwwteINbJCMJAINWN8jg9B1kJwGa13f64k6g_qEHxvqLSXkA9Smkzhle_4UIjmucgpVaNFfj0gSIUpTPUD0Ri6UMRiL8fepuYhq4mDx434eYR5JAT2kZ2qFUsGMLxlMhhLaRu8v2o5K5ow61iVnR036PRk2evhgr-TCdfIhI9OnvDAf_KSGQLRuOmWugKY9OP03HUzHPzK2100aVBB5v2oBNv2wm-jZWOOvA%3D)
---

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=26af5b21b25c4652b4197add6dffa8ff&_e=oC6BiS8n0u2yI3bxurH53FCFJIjg5fktnSI_Ir3URULrJEcLBqbpIljCUwgbwMHm49VO2h32tW_pSD2otwbkp7_DiR81lPU22d_y1PviKAgRlgbmZHYEWv-hM2bsbax8ZEPcmDXEFTB0g9HdFLOz6bMFyT0S-YGnwgusjcBP01DhsD5gUSe8aF7kJLnwC7q41cv3DECD4zl0Mp9xlQFxGS4YGzOMUvxwR589WhJ1H7YrPuzhFhYsoZRWXjSZSN4NhHxHpiPqUF76r7hkKRudZjoQjs0ttYo_69EIWnmX9SrRAg9JSajYOQRBxDeJilBXmBmUIgTVmE47QDVgSPzz644TASaRknxmFwKZJL4mhOgJtsh3uy-JUxdESSzDaxAsbxxLVhOn7PE5IHb-3On6_Kv1btWPS7ooo0br8lYEyWVB-YYVuyR-GBk_3zLTEp4rYrqxfvQO_dLt7dD_Y6Vl_O25lVVaanwu7BPZv461NaQ%3D)**.

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won’t you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=26af5b21b25c4652b4197add6dffa8ff&_e=oC6BiS8n0u2yI3bxurH53FCFJIjg5fktnSI_Ir3URULrJEcLBqbpIljCUwgbwMHm49VO2h32tW_pSD2otwbkp7_DiR81lPU22d_y1PviKAgRlgbmZHYEWv-hM2bsbax8ZEPcmDXEFTB0g9HdFLOz6bMFyT0S-YGnwgusjcBP01DhsD5gUSe8aF7kJLnwC7q41cv3DECD4zl0Mp9xlQFxGS4YGzOMUvxwR589WhJ1H7YrPuzhFhYsoZRWXjSZSN4N9UZWLiLgxZ_P3iDs0ADAKUIwhAzMQ8sQ21tHAOW-OkXekwUA8B031amd-eSPzKiE19IBE9S2vImUETio-GbsyZ0HV3R0wsjodiKwxHAb6WypJXL638CiNOfYkR8rhIsw2orEKQcMXRg-B8DyL8JgWT5dvbIv_5GGwRXmTcIbHiUeBQx7cKJ302LcaX8wEEXBhOtPxvttSJxzDW-qXH1v-i7vztAYp2rZw_HfOork4Rg%3D)**

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=26af5b21b25c4652b4197add6dffa8ff&_e=oC6BiS8n0u2yI3bxurH53FCFJIjg5fktnSI_Ir3URULrJEcLBqbpIljCUwgbwMHm49VO2h32tW_pSD2otwbkp7_DiR81lPU22d_y1PviKAgRlgbmZHYEWv-hM2bsbax8ZEPcmDXEFTB0g9HdFLOz6bMFyT0S-YGnwgusjcBP01DhsD5gUSe8aF7kJLnwC7q41cv3DECD4zl0Mp9xlQFxGS4YGzOMUvxwR589WhJ1H7YrPuzhFhYsoZRWXjSZSN4NaihhPE18XFjghTnM100m-aUYFZavlzmvvVZLj1kkePos9tDOEb5svKI0biJ6wQ_nu9JcFQ-GRJ6AhRPjHxcytOUSPcIvr5wYz2_67ADOJM2lupOiZTDEvpZCrk5BryVv9yAhn-qijBSQ0Hhe5L3If-RB21la3lZlrOQEsIpITKKx2WcIbMv-FSM9lDZS5tT1sMxnoUs_FebT7eZzCgOCWvvQXpesl4F9D58Y8voKTvI%3D)**

clean_body: September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party. My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this! Here’s my elevator pitch to you : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign. September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office. I’m the man I am today because ISIS (Islamic State) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, I joined Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012. I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a CIA conference focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country. | We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great. I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us! I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas. Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills. But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. . In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces. It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that. The climate is in crisis and we need to act like it. The IPCC has come out with yet another assessment that states that climate change will only continue to intensify for the next 20 to 30 years since we have delayed for too long.
[**NEW YORK TIMES: ****_A Hotter Future Is Certain, Climate Panel Warns.
But How Hot Is Up to Us._**](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=9f16a10b1d&e=76fc145c69)

| Forests are burning in the West. The ocean is on fire in the Gulf of Mexico. And our planet is heating up a few degrees every year and it is starting to look like there is no turning back. We have been pushing for massive changes and we know the people who will carry that to fruition in the legislature.

Our candidates and our group within the Virginia Justice Democrats are committed to leading the Way on Climate, Green Jobs, & Environmental Justice. That takes bold actors and sweeping legislation like an authentically Virginia Green New Deal. That takes help from everyday people just like you to get us there.

[Can you help us by chipping in $5, $25, $50, or more to our efforts here in Virginia? Even the smallest amount can make big difference. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=371b94b2ae&e=76fc145c69)

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Obama and the Hypocrisy of the Left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | _[View online](https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGm9U7&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EMxRG0w&)_
---
| | |
---
| | **The elitist Democrats like the Obamas love their "rules for thee, but not for me."**
---
| | ** ****Barrack Obama threw a "scaled back" party for his 60th birthday. "Close friends and family" were supposedly only included as the 44th President had massive tents set up across the Martha Vineyard Grounds.**
I personally think Obama had the right to gather in his own home and conduct himself how he sees fit. But the hypocrites of the leftist Democrat party think that we, the American people, need to have our businesses shuttered while they get to live above the hellish rules they create. [_Obama was also videoed dancing maskless, a mask the left wants to force on all of our faces._](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SXmytX&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EVV5ViR&)
**I have a massive problem with the Democrat 's overreach against our rights and freedoms, freedoms endowed to us by our Creator.**
What was the response that was given when Obama and other elitists were called out on this behavior? They agreed that Obama's celebration should be scaled down (even though it was still heavily attended) and then they want more restrictions put in place against the American people using the guise of "COVID." Governor Abbott of Texas pointed out the Democrat**'** s unacceptable behavior (behavior that is typical of Democrats) when Texas Democrats fled to Washington and ignored their sworn duties. **Guess how the Dems responded?**
They're filing a lawsuit against Governor Abbott because they feel he is responsible for their embarrassment. The left wants to bully you or anyone who stands up to their behavior. The Democrats don't want equality, they want to be better than you and above the law. The left loves the freedoms of our great nation, they just don't want _**you**_ to have those same freedoms.
_**We must stop them.**_
I'm going to be blunt here. Our country is heading for trouble if enough good men and women do nothing._** **_ Being complacent is doing nothing. Being angry and frustrated won't stop any of the leftist's "America Last" agenda unless we put action behind it. We need to stand together and speak loud and clear we know our rights as Americans and we won't allow them to be taken from us.
---
|
---
** A common question I'm asked is, "What do we do?"**
There are so many things we can and should be doing. The first is to have your voice be heard. Free speech is so vital to a free society. We need to contact elected officials and let them know we do not support the radical agenda the Democrats have planned for this nation. We also need to hold those in office accountable and be aware of their actions. We can't simply vote for someone because they're a Republican, we must demand that they abide by our constitution.
**Dan Newhouse betrayed the American people when he sided with the Democrats.**
At least with a Democrat**,** you know who they are and what they stand for. But RINOs seem to be a special kind of disease and support the Democrat agenda as they pretend to be the party of "America First." I'm done with people like Newhouse and other RINO's who say one thing and do the other. I will stand up for America and for the American people as I have before.
Honored to serve.
**_Let's take a stand._**
Loren

Loren | & | & | & PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS | | , 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States You may or at any time. Powered by:&

name: Great America Update
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
I hope you’re having a good day today. You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c369%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=BTvUqQd9kdMq61d8yQDXyQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65710%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BkteBCNnSGuuSPwX3LQthQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day today. You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated. It may make you wonder, as it does me: How should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges? Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given us the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65710%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BkteBCNnSGuuSPwX3LQthQ&sysid=1) These essays were written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ , and were published initially as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And Mark Levin--the “Great One”--gave Hillsdale a rare first edition set of these famous essays. They’re on display at our Allan P. Kirby, Jr. Center in Washington, D.C. It’s safe to say we’re pretty fond of _The Federalist Papers_ around here. In fact, that’s why we developed a course dedicated just to these important essays. There is no better guide to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through the words of the Founders themselves. That’s why I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, [_**"The Federalist Papers,”**_ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65711%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o1CN6fH62O%2begxGsAZ5cFQ&sysid=1)on DVD today with your generous donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. You can learn more about this special DVD box set using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65712%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rPxmDoEWEWDFcE%2fimz5ZPQ&sysid=1)** Thanks for reading my email, and I hope you’ll reserve your copy of **[_“The Federalist Papers”_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65713%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RJwSNma8GodY40QbrXd2vw&sysid=1)** _** **_ DVD box set today. Supplies are limited and I’d hate for you to miss out. Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c369%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=BTvUqQd9kdMq61d8yQDXyQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c369%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=BTvUqQd9kdMq61d8yQDXyQ&sysid=1)

clean_body: Last year, we elected a record-breaking number of outstanding Republican women to the House of Representatives. We need to keep up that momentum, ele Peter, Last year, we elected a record-breaking number of outstanding Republican women to the House of Representatives. We need to keep up that momentum, elect even more Republican women, and take back the House once and for all come November 2022. Will you chip in right away to help us reach our goal and restore a Republican majority next year? The 2020 election cycle was our most difficult yet, but outstanding female Republican candidates won many of the toughest races throughout the country. Now, Republican women are poised to make a big impact in the 2022 midterms, too. Chip in now to help them win. I’m running for Congress to add to our ranks by becoming another strong conservative voice in Congress and flipping the key swing districts we need to win back our majority. Will you chip in just a few dollars today to make it happen? We need to recruit the strongest possible candidates to flip the five swing districts we need to restore our GOP majority--Peter, and this includes our very district here in Pennsylvania. Chip in now to help fuel our efforts. Thanks for your support, Peter. It’s time once and for all we send Susan Wild packing. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Team Heinrich
subject: [Petition] Call on the EPA to enact strong methane regulations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33788622/299953080/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210809_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_TH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGZiZjliMi01ZmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHHJkjK0hKDhwRMFZ9va0zRM19AdZpGLhUmGUtLOrUk=&emci=2bfbf9b2-5ff9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2dfbf9b2-5ff9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, Last month, President Biden signed Martin’s bipartisan legislation to cut methane emissions into law. It was the most significant action Congress has taken on climate in over a decade. It was a huge victory in the battle to combat the most catastrophic effects of climate change. But our work is far from over. Methane emissions are one of the biggest drivers of the climate crisis. So we’ve got to build on our progress by taking urgent climate action one step further. That’s why Martin and several of his New Mexico colleagues are calling on the EPA to develop stronger methane regulation of the oil and gas industry. [**Will you add your name next to Martin’s to ask the EPA to promote healthier communities and a better climate by imposing stricter methane regulations?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33788623/299953081/1145684501?refcode=MTH_em_20210809_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_TH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGZiZjliMi01ZmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHHJkjK0hKDhwRMFZ9va0zRM19AdZpGLhUmGUtLOrUk=&emci=2bfbf9b2-5ff9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2dfbf9b2-5ff9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33788624/299953082/1145684501?refcode=MTH_em_20210809_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_TH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGZiZjliMi01ZmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHHJkjK0hKDhwRMFZ9va0zRM19AdZpGLhUmGUtLOrUk=&emci=2bfbf9b2-5ff9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2dfbf9b2-5ff9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
New Mexico is a major producer of oil and gas, but that hasn’t stopped the state from showing leadership on cutting methane emissions while creating local jobs at the same time.
The EPA should follow the lead of states like New Mexico and create new, stronger methane protections at this pivotal moment — especially as New Mexico and other parts of the country are suffering from extreme drought and severe weather events.
[**If you agree, add your name in support of the EPA taking urgent action to reduce methane emissions.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33788625/299953083/1145684501?refcode=MTH_em_20210809_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_TH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGZiZjliMi01ZmY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHHJkjK0hKDhwRMFZ9va0zRM19AdZpGLhUmGUtLOrUk=&emci=2bfbf9b2-5ff9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2dfbf9b2-5ff9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

name: Team Bass
subject: Do you support the investigation into January 6?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team --

January 6, 2021 was a dark day in our nation's history. In the weeks and months since the Capitol insurrection, Karen has been working to uncover the truth about the events leading up to and during the attack.

Karen and House Democrats won't stop until we get to the bottom of what happened. Everyone involved in the attack on the Capitol, _including the former president_ , must be held fully accountable for their part in the violent attack on our democracy.

But Republicans don't care about the truth or accountability. GOP leaders are refusing to participate in a bipartisan commission, and they are sabotaging this investigation every step of the way.

**[The GOP wants to end an investigation before it even begins, so Karen wants to know what you think: Should Congress investigate the January 6 Capitol insurrection?](https://act.myngp.com/el/PDL49Njjo_eGBYHaHHhTzJ6_kKoH5OEGqWBwWadcI4E=/8qYZj5FDy7nC4p0aY5bJT_MO4e9g-ci6biV1IWOufN8=?gpsid=39_132_20098&ms=em21_210809_jan6_adv_gq_act_pol_tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210809_jan6_adv_gq_act_pol_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210809_jan6_adv_gq_act_pol_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

| [NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/PDL49Njjo_eGBYHaHHhTzJ6_kKoH5OEGqWBwWadcI4E=/8qYZj5FDy7nC4p0aY5bJT_MO4e9g-ci6biV1IWOufN8=?gpsid=39_132_20098&ms=em21_210809_jan6_adv_gq_act_pol_tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210809_jan6_adv_gq_act_pol_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210809_jan6_adv_gq_act_pol_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Defending our democracy from corruption shouldn't be a political debate. But that's the story McConnell and Republicans are telling.

name: Alex Lasry
subject: It’s a girl!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
I have some big, exciting news: Last week, Lauren and I welcomed Eleanor into the family. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33789652/299955988/1153524951?refcode=EM_PET_210809baby_N_AL_90DA_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzQyZTg0OS02M2Y5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydLMVE5cjzpbAhFkH9oBBmfq66XlFkCFqqAgP_lEl6E=&emci=62c7c36b-4ef9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f342e849-63f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659600)
---
| Peter,

I have some big news! Last week, Lauren and I welcomed baby Eleanor into our family.

Both Lauren and Eleanor are doing great, and I’m so excited to be a dad! It has been a crazy past week, but I wouldn’t change any of it for the world. I want to thank you for all the well-wishes we’ve received -- this is the best team I could ask for, and I could not do this without you.

I can’t wait to see you all back on the campaign trail. I am running for Senate because I want to make sure that Eleanor and all of our kids grow up in a Wisconsin they can be proud of. Thank you for supporting me along the way!

We're passing around this card to sign to welcome Eleanor into the world.

**[Will you sign this card to welcome Eleanor into our family? If you’d like, you can add your own personal wishes, too!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33789653/299955989/1153524951?refcode=EM_PET_210809baby_N_AL_90DA_5_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzQyZTg0OS02M2Y5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydLMVE5cjzpbAhFkH9oBBmfq66XlFkCFqqAgP_lEl6E=&emci=62c7c36b-4ef9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f342e849-63f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659600)** **[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33789654/299955990/1153524951?refcode=EM_PET_210809baby_N_AL_90DA_5_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzQyZTg0OS02M2Y5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydLMVE5cjzpbAhFkH9oBBmfq66XlFkCFqqAgP_lEl6E=&emci=62c7c36b-4ef9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f342e849-63f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659600)** Thanks for helping make this week more special than it already is,

Alex

P.S. **[Follow this link to my Twitter to see photos of Eleanor!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33789655/299955991/-124114176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzQyZTg0OS02M2Y5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydLMVE5cjzpbAhFkH9oBBmfq66XlFkCFqqAgP_lEl6E=&emci=62c7c36b-4ef9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f342e849-63f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659600)**
---

clean_body: I have some big, exciting news: Last week, Lauren and I welcomed Eleanor into the family. | | | Peter, I have some big news! Last week, Lauren and I welcomed baby Eleanor into our family. Both Lauren and Eleanor are doing great, and I’m so excited to be a dad! It has been a crazy past week, but I wouldn’t change any of it for the world. I want to thank you for all the well-wishes we’ve received -- this is the best team I could ask for, and I could not do this without you. I can’t wait to see you all back on the campaign trail. I am running for Senate because I want to make sure that Eleanor and all of our kids grow up in a Wisconsin they can be proud of. Thank you for supporting me along the way! We're passing around this card to sign to welcome Eleanor into the world. Thanks for helping make this week more special than it already is, Alex P.S. ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. name: Val Demings

body:
Senator Jacky Rosen said I could reach out with an important ask in this critical time. Let me take a moment to explain why this is so urgent.
#
Friends,
Senator Jacky Rosen said I could reach out with an important ask in this critical time. Let me take a moment to explain why this is so urgent.
I wish I were bringing better news: Republicans have a massive advantage in Florida organizing and mobilizing. That's on top of their massive advantage in resources: at least $32 million raised between Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm the past few months.
So here’s the bottom line: Republicans have a massive advantage but our grassroots movement is working. The Cook Political Report increased our chances of winning, but this race isn't going to be easy. **I want you to know my fundraising goals matter: When I can't reach my goals, I put a very meaningful win for Floridians and our country at risk. And right now, I'm still $9,123 short of my goal, with only hours until my midnight deadline.**
**[Please, I wouldn't ask if it weren't so important to me. Can I count on you to split a contribution of $5 or more right now to Jacky Rosen and I to help me defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33789738/299956094/-1010633973?refcode=jr_em_i_210809_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmQ2NjA4YS02M2Y5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JGiO8AyrsogyiAiChAUHVUc6s04YM2MpB4Li7iJRDv4=)**
Thank you,
Congresswoman Val Demings

name: Smiley for Washington
subject: Where will we get to see you?
body:
I’ve been traveling our great Washington state!
---
| | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email.
---
| |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00127v9QRuqJUAJOIFVWOb024nC-Tb96_Pi0cyk8qfZ9LLZP5OUurmyhPynIpAxJnPQsM4Vu5Z94yKsCIQlcarqYEwKRJPv4uBUvCJ6F70o69N8wNXyhtDATFNoaUWVFtpO1CGY2izeNOJyNijeXzvCUAvUeh8lTpVjv5Bc_FBDKFt8JgJvnN5aJbZmlhQoeMqy&c=NOqIjiPsInTjmRbum3KNdbqJknwhwJ9oKz7jzJkqzyNcHanNwlSufw==&ch=I-JK7dZW5tInP6ZPvn2NJlBbbb6fGryG5Y2n6UCxzC7lu0YrEmECeA==)
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| I love this great state we live in and I'm proud to call it home. The best thing about the campaign is getting to travel from corner to corner, spending time with my fellow Washingtonians. In fact, I'm planning on visiting all of the counties in Washington by the end of the summer!
During our travels I have listened to so many amazing stories, both happy and sad. I've heard about the successes and the struggles of our communities, and I've seen the effects of Democratic rule.

* Businesses are struggling
* Our homelessness problem is completely out of hand
* Families don't feel safe in their own communities
* And our education system is failing our children

---
| But what's Patty Murray doing about it?!? When was the last time Patty traveled Washington State instead of Washington D.C.?
While Patty's out playing politics in DC, we've been busy! Check out the counties we've visited so far:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00127v9QRuqJUAJOIFVWOb024nC-Tb96_Pi0cyk8qfZ9LLZP5OUurmyhOfz6I97srGGsEvfRIHu_BSvAOdXgJIDCgAsNLoPDyM9TRBKckLPOJIoPCcEODDufD4yL7jw0OhIvC5hk4COf5jOlzAzk3dl23dupR6g75UaGHSkxFee7G6pzxMpLgGWAnYtZmh_kfjDI8H659nqbaU=&c=NOqIjiPsInTjmRbum3KNdbqJknwhwJ9oKz7jzJkqzyNcHanNwlSufw==&ch=I-JK7dZW5tInP6ZPvn2NJlBbbb6fGryG5Y2n6UCxzC7lu0YrEmECeA==)
---
| And I can't wait to visit many more in the coming weeks! While Patty Murray spends her time with DC lobbyists, I'm going to be spending my time with Washingtonians.
But I need your financial support if I'm going to continue reaching the people of Washington State. Our grassroots campaign relies on this to keep on talking to people like you! We are just one seat away from taking back the Senate and firing Chuck Schumer but we have to have the money to get our message out to all Washingtonians!
