name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: I don't want to hear a blip from Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Florida fights Biden |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ee43cbb8aa&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

One question I always had: if Joe Biden was supposedly SO concerned with COVID spikes, why is he letting thousands of COVID-positive illegal aliens into the country?

DC just lacks common sense. That's the problem when you assemble hundreds of career politicians together.

Here in Florida, we are showing the country common sense.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=82df217dc3&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who is a Biden lackey I can beat.**

I love Governor DeSantis. He speaks truth to power and governs with common sense- especially exposing the Left and the media for their LACK of common sense.

Last week, Gov. DeSantis called Biden out:

_Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis blasted President Biden on Wednesday telling him to do his job and secure the southern border and not say "blip" about the coronavirus until he does.

"Why don’t you do your job?" the Florida Republican said during a press conference Wednesday. "Why don't you get this border secure? _And until you do that, I don’t wanna hear a blip about COVID from you, thank you_."

"This is a guy who ran for office saying he’s going to shut down the virus," DeSantis added. "And what has he done? **He’s imported more virus from around the world by having a wide open southern border."**

Biden has been widely criticized on social media over reports that illegal immigrants who are carrying the coronavirus are being released into border communities, in some cases without notifying local law enforcement.

The Biden administration has been pressed on the issue multiple times and has sidestepped the question as to why it is pushing Americans to be vaccinated while allowing unvaccinated and sick migrants into the United States.

**Coronavirus cases among migrants have been surging at the southern border, and in one sector the number of infected migrants recently skyrocketed almost 900%.**_

So that's how it is. Biden uses the levers of the Federal government to attack Florida Gov. DeSantis, but he makes it harder for governors, especially in the South, to contain COVID because he's using Federal immigration policy as a super-spreader.

Open borders = more COVID.

**We clearly need to send people to Congress who will restrain Biden and force him to close our Southern border!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=025ed37ed0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Gov. DeSantis knows what he's doing and is leading Florida extremely well. It's Biden who doesn't know what he's doing.**

**Florida had one of the lowest transmission and death rates from COVID in 2020. It's still not in the top 20 in COVID rates per million, and our hospitals have plenty of room. **

"Granny Killer" Andrew Cuomo is the governor Biden likes best- and 70% of his constituents want him removed from office.

_The lesson? Biden needs to be fought, the American people want him to be challenged, and Florida is showing the way!_

But here's the thing: DeSantis can't do it on his own. The Dems control all of the Federal government. We need to send America First patriots to Congress so we can battle Biden! [Help me put a check and balance on Biden and Pelosi!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=513df0db1d&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1f79173efd&e=afa21b7626)? It's a red-trending swing seat that I overperformed in last year. Florida is swinging red, and people want us to stop Biden's open borders policies!

All Biden has is scare tactics. DeSantis is delivering results. Help me get to Congress so I can bring DeSantis' policies to DC and force Biden to listen!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=79bcf99c24&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5d1c3732e3&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b09e2331cd&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1b9444444b&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=dfc2e90ef7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=dfc2e90ef7).

body:
Judicial Watch announced that it received 1160 pages of documents from Washington, DC’s Office of the Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) related to Air Force veteran and San Diego native Ashli Babbitt.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 9, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56368&L=25551&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFiYml0dC1jcmVtYXRpb24tcmVxdWVzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA5MTkxMTIw) | **[Judicial Watch: New Documents reveal the DC Office of the Chief Medical Examiner Submitted a Request to Cremate Ashli Babbitt Two Days after Gaining Custody of Her Body](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56368&L=25551&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFiYml0dC1jcmVtYXRpb24tcmVxdWVzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA5MTkxMTIw)** Judicial Watch announced that it received 1160 pages of documents from Washington, DC’s Office of the Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) related to Air Force veteran and San Diego native Ashli Babbitt. These new documents reveal that OCME submitted a request for permission to cremate Babbitt only two days after taking custody of her body and that ‘due to the “high profile nature” of Babbitt’s case, Deputy Chief Medical Examiner Francisco Diaz requested that a secure electronic file with limited access be created for Babbitt’s records. Under the program, also referred to as “Remain in Mexico,” asylum-seekers and other aliens who arrived at the Southwest Border were required to remain Mexico while U.S. officials processed their immigration claims. The Biden administration suspended the program on January 21, 2021, then terminated it on June 1, 2021. The disclosure comes more than a decade after Al Qaeda tried to blow up a passenger airplane with explosives hidden in printer cartridges on a U.S.-bound flight from Yemen. The bombs traveled on several freight and passenger planes before being defused. They were bound for Chicago, but federal authorities believe terrorists planned to detonate the bombs mid-air using cell phone timers. ### [US Senate candidate, PA lawmaker call for investigation after reports on Pitt fetal tissue research ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56368&L=25553&F=H&) Fox News The University of Pittsburgh (Pitt) is facing fresh calls for an investigation on its federally funded research on fetal tissue, after information surfaced that many say is troubling.

Republican state Rep. Kathy Rapp, who chairs the majority for the legislature’s Health Committee, sent a letter Thursday requesting Pennsylvania’s auditor general review Pitt’s state and federal funding. Pennsylvania Republican Sean Parnell, who is running for U.S. Senate, also called for an investigation. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it received 1160 pages of documents from Washington, DC’s Office of the Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) related to Air Force veteran and San Diego native Ashli Babbitt. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 9, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that it received 1160 pages of documents from Washington, DC’s Office of the Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) related to Air Force veteran and San Diego native Ashli Babbitt. These new documents reveal that OCME submitted a request for permission to cremate Babbitt only two days after taking custody of her body and that ‘due to the “high profile nature” of Babbitt’s case, Deputy Chief Medical Examiner Francisco Diaz requested that a secure electronic file with limited access be created for Babbitt’s records. ---|--- | | | | == | == The Migrant Protection Protocols program was initiated under President Donald Trump in 2018 and put into effect in early 2019. Under the program, also referred to as “Remain in Mexico,” asylum-seekers and other aliens who arrived at the Southwest Border were required to remain Mexico while U.S. officials processed their immigration claims. The Biden administration suspended the program on January 21, 2021, then terminated it on June 1, 2021. == ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the State Department for non-identifying records of U.S. diplomatic personnel being subjected to invasive COVID-19 “anal swab” tests by the Chinese government. ---|--- | | | | | In a disturbing admission, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) reveals the threat posed by terrorists attempting to conceal explosives in air cargo shipments is “significant” and the agency is not prepared to stop it. The disclosure comes more than a decade after Al Qaeda tried to blow up a passenger airplane with explosives hidden in printer cartridges on a U.S.-bound flight from Yemen. The bombs traveled on several freight and passenger planes before being defused. They were bound for Chicago, but federal authorities believe terrorists planned to detonate the bombs mid-air using cell phone timers. ---|--- | | | Fox News The University of Pittsburgh (Pitt) is facing fresh calls for an investigation on its federally funded research on fetal tissue, after information surfaced that many say is troubling. Republican state Rep. Kathy Rapp, who chairs the majority for the legislature’s Health Committee, sent a letter Thursday requesting Pennsylvania’s auditor general review Pitt’s state and federal funding. Pennsylvania Republican Sean Parnell, who is running for U.S. Senate, also called for an investigation. = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch’s countless lawsuits and political investigations are raising alarm bells on the spread of critical race theory across the United States. From the DOJ’s Georgia Lawsuit, to public schools in Masschusetts, Maryland and elsewhere, policymakers are pushing for every issue to be viewed through the lens of race. = Fox News The Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) has funneled at least $2.7 million into a University of Pittsburgh (Pitt) tissue bank that stores organs from aborted fetuses, according to a release from Judicial Watch Tuesday. The conservative nonprofit obtained hundreds of pages of public records requests, which detail Pitt’s interest in harvesting fetal organs for a project known as the GenitoUrinary Development Molecular Anatomy Project, or GUDMAP. == == = = = = | CLIPS == | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

| **** President Biden — we will not accept your agencies’ mandates or your reported moves toward a lockdown. No one should follow the CDC’s anti-science mask mandates. And if you want to shutdown federal agencies again — some of which aren’t even back to work fully — I will stop every bill coming through the Senate with an amendment to cut their funding if they don’t come to work. Local bureaucrats and union bosses — we will not allow you to do more harm to our children again this year. Children are not at any more risk from COVID than they are for the seasonal flu. Every adult who works in schools has either had the vaccine or had their chance to get vaccinated. There is no reason for mask mandates, part time schools, or any lockdown measures. Children are falling behind in school, and are being harmed physically and psychologically by the tactics you have used to keep them from the classroom last year. We won’t allow it again. If a school system attempts to keep the children from full-time, in-person school, I will hold up every bill with two amendments. One to defund them, and another to allow parents the choice of where the money goes for their child’s education. Do I sound fed up to you? That’s because I am. I’m not a career politician. I’ve practiced medicine for 33 years. I graduated from Duke Medical School and worked in emergency rooms. I studied immunology and virology and ultimately chose to become a surgeon. I have been telling everyone for a year now that Dr. Fauci and other public health officials were NOT following science, and I’ve been proved right time and time again. In Liberty, Rand Paul

Peter,

Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite.

That's why they're censoring my video discussing the actual facts about masks.

YouTube won't play it, but you can hear it right from me here:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58103901:J8ErzSlNe:m:1:3253819041:82620A5F788FC144E3B21D6A0AEDBFCA:r)

**_The willingness to block useful information like this from the American public is truly sick and it is dangerous._**

Americans should have the right to know all there is to know and make decisions for their own health.

But with tech giants teaming up with Fauci, we're not hearing the truth. We're hearing regurgitated soundbites from a self-interested bureaucrat.

**It's not medicine. It's not science. And it's NOT true.**

They can try to silence me but Peter, I'm not backing down from this fight. Please, stand with me today to share the facts that Fauci and his allies don't want you to hear.

In Liberty,

| Friends, We have a crisis at our southern border – and Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi don’t care. Their open border policies are making our country less safe and secure, spreading covid at our southern border and overwhelming our brave border agents. We are seeing the highest number of illegal border crossings in nearly 20 years. We must return to the border policies of President Trump that kept our country safe. _We need to build the wall, end catch and release and re-instate the remain in Mexico policy._ To do this we need to fire Nancy Pelosi next November and elect strong Conservatives like my friend Randy Feenstra. Randy has visited our southern border to see this crisis firsthand. He understands that a secure border means a safe America. He supports our brave law enforcement officers. Last year Nancy Pelosi and her hand-picked liberal candidate spent nearly **_3 MILLION DOLLARS_** to defeat Randy – and they will try again. We can’t end this crisis until we fire Pelosi. [**_Will you contribute to Randy today to ensure we win a Republican majority in the House?_**](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=faG4YsHB1kOcXrql%2FjAZAv8UiQ%2B6%2FUEFi8b26uvkPKHuCXCs5sPjnSQIwStL2wRFN9NmVTRrxLHnOIiiGAgfr%2F3FQIGrhi4NYgQDh%2Fgquh87fREFTlATHoxQDHRbJ%2Beq&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FUDMFG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DkjYctiBca4wBxwlZMQ2x2nvRJkNbiKappd0wwJhIMjdH-36trNf7yeDQBP3xRgu60&I=20210809194521.00000002609d%40mail6-50-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjIwMDg5NTYwNjc7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE2OTU0NDA0MDs%3D&V=3&S=M6OagEqdB-wHZdG5XgdJBNin0ADkv2kqIKDVgjwmwAs)

clean_body: | | | | | , | Friends, We have a crisis at our southern border – and Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi don’t care. Their open border policies are making our country less safe and secure, spreading covid at our southern border and overwhelming our brave border agents. We are seeing the highest number of illegal border crossings in nearly 20 years. We must return to the border policies of President Trump that kept our country safe. We need to build the wall, end catch and release and re-instate the remain in Mexico policy. To do this we need to fire Nancy Pelosi next November and elect strong Conservatives like my friend Randy Feenstra. Randy has visited our southern border to see this crisis firsthand. He understands that a secure border means a safe America. He supports our brave law enforcement officers. Last year Nancy Pelosi and her hand-picked liberal candidate spent nearly 3 MILLION DOLLARS to defeat Randy – and they will try again. We can’t end this crisis until we fire Pelosi. | | | When we win back Congress we will be able to secure our border, support our law enforcement officers and end the crisis at our southern border. But, we need your help! | | | Thanks, Senator Ted Cruz | | Paid for by Feenstra for Congress Not interested in email updates from Feenstra For Congress? name: Team Schrier
subject: How to protect yourself from COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We are once again seeing an alarming rise in COVID-19 cases across the country. Here in Washington State, hospital occupations are at the highest rates seen this year as the contagious Delta variant continues to spread. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33791970/299962973/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWQxNTVlOC02ZGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6l3-PB5VyBmf-tWE_oW0YX56Pj7Z0TDNrpRCybG84w=&emci=7477a033-1bf9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d1d155e8-6df9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

We are once again seeing an alarming rise in COVID-19 cases across the country. Here in Washington State, hospital occupations are at the highest rates seen this year as the contagious Delta variant continues to spread.

We are not out of the woods yet, and we must continue to take precautions to keep ourselves, our family, and our community safe. Here are a few ways to protect yourself against COVID-19:
1. The best protection we have against this virus is the COVID-19 vaccine. Washington State Department of Health officials reported that 94% of recent cases, deaths, and hospitalizations of those 12 years of age and older are people who are not fully vaccinated. **[If you have not yet received your COVID-19 vaccine, now is the time to do so. Find a vaccination site and make an appointment now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33791971/299962974/1664743381?language=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWQxNTVlOC02ZGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6l3-PB5VyBmf-tWE_oW0YX56Pj7Z0TDNrpRCybG84w=&emci=7477a033-1bf9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d1d155e8-6df9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)**

2. If you're experiencing symptoms of COVID-19 or have been in contact with someone who has tested positive, please get tested. **[Find a testing site near you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33791972/299962975/605433094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWQxNTVlOC02ZGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6l3-PB5VyBmf-tWE_oW0YX56Pj7Z0TDNrpRCybG84w=&emci=7477a033-1bf9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d1d155e8-6df9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)**

3. Please **[follow the CDC's guidelines](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33791973/299962976/-658981742?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWQxNTVlOC02ZGY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6l3-PB5VyBmf-tWE_oW0YX56Pj7Z0TDNrpRCybG84w=&emci=7477a033-1bf9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d1d155e8-6df9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)** and wear your mask indoors in public if you are in an area of substantial or high transmission, even if you're fully vaccinated.

Kim is continuing to work in Congress to keep our communities safe and provide relief to families and small businesses. As schools prepare to re-open, she's fighting to make frequent, at-home testing widely available to keep our children and educators safe.

A return to normalcy will take all of us working together, so please make sure you're doing your part to stop the spread of this disease.

Thank you,

Team Schrier

| Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: [Add your name] Cancel Student Loan Debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
President Biden extended the student loan moratorium until the end of January. That’s good, but it’s not enough.
**We can’t just keep putting off the inevitable.** Next year, folks crushed by student loan debt — debt that disproportionately affects women and people of color — will have to start paying again. After the personal and financial setbacks experienced by so many during this pandemic, now’s not the time to place more burdens on people.
45 million people hold more than $1.7 trillion of student loan debt. They need relief and we need President Biden to cancel student loan debt immediately. **[If you agree, sign our petition now calling on President Biden to get rid of student loan debt right away. He has the power to do it and we demand he take action. All it takes is the stroke of a pen.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/cancel-student-loan-debt-aug21/?source=em20210809-529&t=1&akid=529%2E420207%2E_C2oPL)**
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/cancel-student-loan-debt-aug21/?source=em20210809-529&t=2&akid=529%2E420207%2E_C2oPL)**
Next year, millions of people across the country will be forced to restart making payments that they simply can’t afford.
This country was already experiencing historic economic inequality long before the COVID-19 crisis. One in four student debt borrowers were behind on payments even before the pandemic started. Canceling this debt is an economic justice issue, and one we must keep fighting for.
Forgiving student loan debt now would be a massive step towards true economic relief during this pandemic, and beyond.
**[Pramila needs your help to make student debt cancellation and economic justice a reality. Add your name to call on Biden to take action and cancel student debt.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/cancel-student-loan-debt-aug21/?source=em20210809-529&t=3&akid=529%2E420207%2E_C2oPL)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/cancel-student-loan-debt-aug21/?source=em20210809-529&t=4&akid=529%2E420207%2E_C2oPL)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210809-529-footer&t=5&refcode2=529_420207__C2oPL&akid=529%2E420207%2E_C2oPL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=529%2E420207%2E_C2oPL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=529%2E420207%2E_C2oPL)

| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33793341/299981987/-686739743?refcode=em-08092021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjM1MzVjNy03NWY5LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vAKDaifPzAyUBh6uIT1u9IgPIo6txkt_P85sYWEsV1g=)**
---

I grew up in a small working class town here in California.

Everyone knew one another. My dad was a teacher, and my mom was a secretary. They worked hard, but always made time for family.

At first, my parents couldn't afford to send me to a university -- so I started at a community college instead. I paid my way through school working at a lunch counter.

**For me, hard work paid off. But after 20 years of teaching students, it's clear that our opportunities to get ahead are being cut short by politicians like Kevin McCarthy.**

Kevin has represented us for nearly 15 years with absolutely NOTHING to show for it except being a lapdog to Trump and his wealthy donors.

I hear stories every day from my kiddos and their parents about the challenges they face -- recovering from COVID-19, the lack of affordable health care, and struggling businesses.

My dad was a teacher, and my mom was a secretary. They worked hard, but always made time for family. At first, my parents couldn't afford to send me to a university -- so I started at a community college instead. I paid my way through school working at a lunch counter. For me, hard work paid off. But after 20 years of teaching students, it's clear that our opportunities to get ahead are being cut short by politicians like Kevin McCarthy. Friend –

**The CDC's sudden and unclear decision to reverse its mask policy is just another example of policy that makes no sense in America.**

This decision is counter-productive and goes directly against the CDC's previous statement that fully vaccinated people do not have to wear masks.

I demand more transparency – not only from the CDC but from our government. | | [**$15 TO HOLD THE CDC ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=c9e150008f6f4815b12a913bb4354140&_e=E7SK5srwCKTiLGV190OjEJG2ybOOHAqtts6z4HYy0n0GXFSy893DmEfb6lrhYUNA2NVslZjwdH03KC05Smbn8ncRJ4KY4HwP9BSE5sux9IYTadxV-LbXXuYN7mF1qfWd_yskTC-TP2cJvDSGmHKY_0C2CT6NXGWm9UyxoQlMOoqZFer35ONpaqRhK9xQt0silmYW7IXpCPIz3gE65_cxC67xDR9_z6znxQhxllr4z4hUtevkDBYayY3OsRorLEAoGeG83RuKiP8ydx2-r78tVePnAbx1LmPM_n4fsY9CBPTwq0P2d_knUiqmQCGW2BUm1UjZHANGSTvzPQTrnLRkI9PdqOXrBi6GukQB8aXgfplCPeDIU6XxjGmH_uXnmF8RRONbSi1eAUoloBB5dhPkQlOEk_hlaK00DeZj3mgirK384Nz0tYz35ua9m6Auf213DmWcgEcbF2FXy6NpAXpb7Q%3D%3D)

For the last year and a half, Americans have made tremendous sacrifices to halt the virus's spread._**The American people deserve the truth – not this endless cycle of flip-flop decision-making and ambiguous answers.**_

No American should be forced to get the vaccine through a government mandate. The American people deserve to see exactly what data President Biden and his team are using to make these decisions – which the CDC cannot currently offer us.

That’s why I signed the Restore Public Health Institution Trust Act -- but this is only the beginning. **[We still have so much to do, and I need your help.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=c9e150008f6f4815b12a913bb4354140&_e=E7SK5srwCKTiLGV190OjEJG2ybOOHAqtts6z4HYy0n0GXFSy893DmEfb6lrhYUNA2NVslZjwdH03KC05Smbn8ncRJ4KY4HwP9BSE5sux9IYTadxV-LbXXuYN7mF1qfWd_yskTC-TP2cJvDSGmHKY_0C2CT6NXGWm9UyxoQlMOoqZFer35ONpaqRhK9xQt0silmYW7IXpCPIz3gE65_cxC9bqu7hBFmD0lkBnXCAEDjqaavBIDZhncg6eKCCfhBc1V06cuCtuNRFzgVfW-4o3-nZr15XBxmiHZdOAn2XJKH4N0Bo57dZ1m4xAjKkbisnOHaRbK4nLWuK9YkIkEmvweVaKU8Hxf8ibpMSThbLUQ3_2bnCgeImyuNffcxvHHAMDmgfbEiaGhW9CFsDhALoFgrQkFMxodCs2JOO-eddjmLEm7ox_g_xBIONPjKdP61ni)**

clean_body: That's Why I Signed the Restore Public Health Institution Trust Act | Friend – The CDC's sudden and unclear decision to reverse its mask policy is just another example of policy that makes no sense in America. This decision is counter-productive and goes directly against the CDC's previous statement that fully vaccinated people do not have to wear masks. I demand more transparency – not only from the CDC but from our government. | | For the last year and a half, Americans have made tremendous sacrifices to halt the virus's spread.The American people deserve the truth – not this endless cycle of flip-flop decision-making and ambiguous answers. No American should be forced to get the vaccine through a government mandate. The American people deserve to see exactly what data President Biden and his team are using to make these decisions – which the CDC cannot currently offer us. That’s why I signed the Restore Public Health Institution Trust Act -- but this is only the beginning. The CDC must be held accountable. This is non-negotiable. | | | | Thank you for all of your support, Senator Braun Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: It's Biden vs. America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Our movement is growing |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5d0aa95d96&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the State Representative in Arizona responsible for kickstarting the Election Integrity movement in Arizona – with help from America First, grassroots people all across America like you and me! [_Donate now to join our movement!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d09b1721a3&e=44b8c466b0)

**Want proof? It’s spreading like wildfire!**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8c9b521cda&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **We are seeing unprecedent numbers flock to the #ProveIt movement! **

_We’ve done the work, we have shown the evidence._

[_If you want the Democrats to prove there was no fraud, donate HERE!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=de8bfdf8b5&e=44b8c466b0)

**I have been fighting election fraud from the BEGINNING. And I want to continue the fight for YOU!**

The Secretary of State Races are going to be some of the most important in America in 2022.

**Why?**

Because they oversee the elections! This is why I am so proud to be the favorite, pro-Trump candidate to run for Secretary of State in Arizona!

**We need a strong Secretary of State in Arizona that will stand up to the bullies...**

Like the Biden administration...
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=329e2bdb50&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Can you believe that the Biden administration is threatening to lock up Republicans who want them to #ProveIt?

**This is what silencing political enemies looks like.**

_Conservative Brief_ reports:

_The U.S. Department of Justice is now telling states that they should not pursue their own Arizona-style election audits._

_The DOJ’s new guidance document claims that undertaking “partisan” election audits could violate federal law, which seems like a clear statement directed at Republicans who support audits in states._

_“The guidance document explicitly warns against audits in which election officials are forced to turn over materials like ballots or voting machines to state lawmakers or third parties — as in Arizona, whose audit is being run by the private company Cyber Ninjas,” Forbes reported._

_“There are federal or criminal penalties attached,” the guidance asserts._

_Biden’s DOJ then suggests that those who carry out audits of the 2020 election “can face fines of up to $1,000 and imprisonment of up to one year for each violation.”_

**But I have been vocal, and I have been standing up and fighting against the Biden Administration and his cronies like Attorney General Merrick Garland.**

**The article continues:**

_Arizona Rep. Mark Finchem, who is now running for Arizona Secretary of State to replace Democrat Katie Hobbs, recently warned Attorney General Merrick Garland against getting involved in Arizona._

_“I got news for Merrick Garland, there’s this little thing called the Constitution,” said Finchem. “Article I, section IV, the times, places, and manner of holding an election for senators and representatives... it is the legislature that has responsibility for nominating and naming the electors for President.”_

_“I would advise Merrick Garland and his team of thugs that now occupy the Department of Justice: Tread very lightly,” he added._

_Finchem said: “Our attorney general, I spoke with their representative this morning, I’m not going to put him on the hook for anything, but you’re going to walk into a very surprising reception if you try to do anything in this state that interferes with legislative authority in handling our elections. Hard stop.”_

**To anyone who wants to mess with election integrity, to anyone who wants to stop the greatest grassroots movement in America, and to anyone who wants to interfere with America’s Audit in Maricopa County, I have exactly two words for you.**

__Tread lightly.__

_Help me stand up for you and election integrity by supporting my campaign for Secretary of State. [Please donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2eaad4120b&e=44b8c466b0)_

**I’m reminded of Lee Greenwood’s famous lyrics today:**

_I’m proud to be an American, where at least I know I’m free._

I want you to ask yourself one question. _In a world where you can be incarcerated for up to one year for protecting the integrity of our elections, are you truly free?_

**If so, what is freedom? And if not, what will you do to defend it?**

_[Donate today to make these lyrics true again.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9f83892098&e=44b8c466b0) Let’s defend freedom together._
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=74f6f2d55b&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bd65c22154&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=181a4a855b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=181a4a855b).

3. **Then: DeSantis’ office accused Psaki of playing politics with the pandemic.**

[This is RIDICULOUS. We’re disgusted with Ron’s baseless attacks. That’s why we’re calling on 5,000 Democrats to stand with Jen Psaki and condemn Ron DeSantis! »](https://act.ronbegone.com/survey/PET20210809_psaki/?source=RBG_20210809_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=420%2E564421%2ENvUKHd) | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.ronbegone.com/survey/PET20210809_psaki/?source=RBG_20210809_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=420%2E564421%2ENvUKHd)

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. Friend,
---
The radical Left wants to rewrite our nation’s history...

__But let me be frank -- coming from a family that went from slavery to West Point in just 5 generations, I know that Critical Race Theory is wrong. Plain and simple.__

**America is NOT a racist country. I put my life on the line for this country in the Army because I’m proud to call America my home.**
---
That’s why I’m asking YOU to join me in demanding that Critical Race Theory be kept out of our schools to prevent the Left from indoctrinating our kids with their radical agenda.

clean_body: Critical Race Theory is wrong. Plain and simple. | Friend, The radical Left wants to rewrite our nation’s history... They’re trying to force their agenda and ideology onto our children by implementing Critical Race Theory into our schools’ curriculums. But let me be frank -- coming from a family that went from slavery to West Point in just 5 generations, I know that Critical Race Theory is wrong. Plain and simple. America is NOT a racist country. I put my life on the line for this country in the Army because I’m proud to call America my home. That’s why I’m asking YOU to join me in demanding that Critical Race Theory be kept out of our schools to prevent the Left from indoctrinating our kids with their radical agenda. name: David McIntosh
subject: Stop Green New Deal Lite
body:
Companies that go "woke" and try to cancel conservatives and promote a political agenda should stop expecting special perks like tax breaks from Washington that they should have NEVER had in the first place. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bbd11cc1f0b54c179fbf4989f9eb1345&_e=u9VGvFCwIF9wYoIdvyhTh6S6QAReGWEd_YckUFzBBNHXdCTOhKkvBr4LVu_3mnQgUxs1Li3dwvRJL6mIflbHHtNzRhOauYY9mi-3A1oWmfWd-fq3Agryoo6xSZfAhJkiKupg_iUH97_68E-Ajw_pura9UByNqmFcOAbr0I_-xEAf9Bivd_8ipH9_MmHCl4_UTwKU8u8EHPHQ6PawBuai98kCudzfhH9qPgChwn3Pv4SbNDbMIyiejYkvErx8EF1P)
---
Dear Friend,

**[Action Required: Stop the "Infauxstructure" Bill!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bbd11cc1f0b54c179fbf4989f9eb1345&_e=u9VGvFCwIF9wYoIdvyhTh6S6QAReGWEd_YckUFzBBNEqDj1N5lbSP77lkYh3Ga_QhE1kcXlfSr9ZG6qfooIIHv96Ht6kUfRWdMN5PvR5PhqKg2N_spmRTDmZDcqsW6ZNSPn9icS7nP9Po56OvGzzM3X7awqBD46fAdH32q5L1q3HDvSR0GS2QhPwSR6BAfHuECJ10M5LzX-Nb4PyIibADnLiBECGnAwvmdeWSCareqrfnbliIhWkdumPSurKPHXT)**

The **Senate is now expected to vote TONIGHT** on the so-called bipartisan infrastructure bill, which is essentially a Green New Deal lite.

This $1.2 TRILLION "infrastructure" bill **includes hardly any money for fixing our roads and bridges** , and instead wastes money on Green New Deal provisions including $7.5 billion for electric vehicles and EV charging stations, $66 billion for Amtrak and other rail, and $21 billion for “environmental remediation.”

In short, a vote for this legislation is a vote for wasting our hard-earned taxpayer dollars on policies being pushed by AOC, Bernie Sanders, and the rest of the Radical Left.

Yet, some Establishment Republicans are thinking of teaming up with ALL Democrats to vote for this disastrous bill.

That is why we need YOUR help!

**[Contact your Senators here and tell them to vote NO on the "Infauxstructure" Bill!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bbd11cc1f0b54c179fbf4989f9eb1345&_e=u9VGvFCwIF9wYoIdvyhTh6S6QAReGWEd_YckUFzBBNHVk7BMq95KkOGByBC8o3zOVdjv2G4DZenEQ3xOMDyIZ_xT7Bw1P1jmhfKof4W4-eZzOWdqKmIAMFRWdifhUqaUXnVVHjng9Kkmrtt3_GEQ6l5vjIbMxAtsPkuXKuHDBx3b9n20Ks9D3hf7rKZf-EV9EgdqqvYjKS2Q6vkKaClQ1CTHG5cy4XVnK_kiAuFEAPVluHh-XJbrbfhKWjb2HAlc)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bbd11cc1f0b54c179fbf4989f9eb1345&_e=u9VGvFCwIF9wYoIdvyhTh6S6QAReGWEd_YckUFzBBNHhnaR0Tc0HTNAaGfc7RestbYYMvO2J0vnR5g2almAkHaHzADQoElxpA3uJFixc3BzXp2hCh5V8kF08XOFqaLCQBlu_BOsEdsOuzOcpzEayGwKZnFRWT2dLOiPllgnuzleUftt88nTbEeo869Dp-5I1eeCqXoIhY0Y-tI_441L1mIAlhOgAVLpJOq-qHDEReTWOJab-6t6x490JGLcTG-C6)
[**Click here to contact your Senators!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bbd11cc1f0b54c179fbf4989f9eb1345&_e=u9VGvFCwIF9wYoIdvyhTh6S6QAReGWEd_YckUFzBBNGV9qlwq5FqABt6ON2CXGrpPf__C7uVTSmQ6ryDvxYBzJWfyq1Sx-otHXd-OPC8y-FnkR8rtJKn85aPqh3wXYzxrxxj-hDBvpNI021wBZD85mpKf8TV8SsYJpPFIBPt2spMqbuWbuAEY011INwsP1HweTjwTF-8W3DCdFoUtOvO6sNWoSnwMmpYguePC3wG0318FmWssJ-kyYDK896aIUhK)

Thank you in advance for your help in this critical cause.

Sincerely,

David McIntosh
President, Club for Growth

P.S. We don't have a lot of time. Chuck Schumer is expected to force the vote on the bill TONIGHT. **[Don't wait—contact your Senators here and tell them to vote NO!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bbd11cc1f0b54c179fbf4989f9eb1345&_e=u9VGvFCwIF9wYoIdvyhTh6S6QAReGWEd_YckUFzBBNFgHbvcffZwP6cfyspzuYhYTFZ0nh4CNoGTgp8Xb5cm9zIGt0eApYRKqSqLA0xsGpHJ8PSURdYSRbkJPZplbKi61Z5akLV6MdRHc5KFt1ryjLVYiwn_0wxqXzZrT5kIJOOIM6lbGfiw6NSbqV99G-aoEIUDANsYalOaao7FDc6R795NTjQrcfUvP7KxsuR-vGP5W8b95vJGJ53XPaFg9TB0)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: Trump’s BS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s an idea...
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210809-2241-header&t=1&akid=2241%2E434096%2EMI7a36)
By all reports, it looks like Congress is *finally* moving forward with legislation to enact President Biden’s infrastructure plan.
So here’s an idea for you, Peter: **We should make a _huuuuuge_ down payment on the infrastructure package with the BILLIONS of dollars we’d save by repealing Donald Trump’s GOP Tax Scam.**
[**_If you like that idea, trust me when I say that I’ve got plenty more like it. Can you donate your first $5 or more today to support me and our campaign for U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27673?refcode=em20210809-2241&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2241%2E434096%2EMI7a36)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27673?refcode=em20210809-2241&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2241%2E434096%2EMI7a36)**
Look, I don’t want to dwell in the past. But back in 2017, Trump and his Republicans voted to slash TRILLIONS in taxes for the rich and corporations.
Trump claimed that his tax cuts would "pay for themselves." But that was a lie. More than half of Trump’s Tax Scam savings went into the pockets of the wealthiest 20% of Americans.
The bottom line is that I will ALWAYS fight on the side of working people to deliver President Biden’s agenda to the American people.
And when I talk about making a _huuuuuge_ down payment on Biden’s infrastructure plan with the money we’d save by repealing Trump’s GOP Tax Scam, I’m not joking around.
**Let me be very clear. Send me to Washington, and I will *actually* vote and behave like a Democrat.**
[**_If I sound like someone you want to see in the U.S. Senate, will you please make your very first donation of $5 or more to our campaign today?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27673?refcode=em20210809-2241&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2241%2E434096%2EMI7a36)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27673?refcode=em20210809-2241&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2241%2E434096%2EMI7a36)**
It’s gonna take a team effort to win our primary, so thanks for hearing me out.
More soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210809-2241-footer&t=24&refcode2=2241_434096_MI7a36&akid=2241%2E434096%2EMI7a36)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: you’re the only Cresco Democrat that didn’t respond: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. So we’re reaching out one more time to get your thoughts on the USPS: | dpwillis67@gmail.com Cresco Democrats | | what Elizabeth Warren said: So, we urgently need to protect the U.S. Postal Service, And we chose you as [1] of [3] Cresco Democrats for this survey, | Thanks for responding, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: January 6 Investigation (via WDTO)
subject: Get ready for more right-wing violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, According to the Department of Homeland Security, some of the former president's supporters remain a threat, as they continue to fall deeper and deeper into the alt-right conspiracy theories about Trump being reinstated as president as early as this month. The latest report states that “as public visibility of the narratives increases, we are concerned about more calls to violence. Reporting indicates that the timing for these activities may occur during August 2021, although we lack information on specific plots or planned actions." Peter, right-wing extremists are planning their next violent attack NOW, which could be just as devastating as or even worse than what we witnessed on January 6. Also, consider the impact another political attack will have on our elections and our democracy for years to come. We cannot allow the alt-right to strike fear into the hearts and minds of Americans across the country. We cannot let them overtake something as precious as our democracy. Unfortunately, Republicans in Congress are still peddling conspiracy theories of election fraud, ballot tampering, and more. That's why we're turning to you. You can help us oust every conspiracy theorist fanning the flames of right-wing violence from Congress. Without these Republicans in Congress fueling conspiracy theories, we will see a dramatic drop in alt-right violence. You've been with us since the beginning of our fight to kick out of Congress every fascist who incited the violence on our Capitol, and that's why we need you today. **[We need to raise $1,394 from grassroots supporters like you who want to see an end to the conspiracy theories and violence. So we're asking: Can you give $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can and help us hit our goal by midnight tonight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33795177/299991369/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210809_GEN_FDR_Z&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzNjQxMWRjLTgyZjktZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aVQBOwKybAdmuE8ZXtigdLlgd63A7s2GOZOFDYbuZps=)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Peter, right-wing extremists are planning their next violent attack NOW, which could be just as devastating as or even worse than what we witnessed on January 6. Also, consider the impact another political attack will have on our elections and our democracy for years to come. We cannot allow the alt-right to strike fear into the hearts and minds of Americans across the country. We cannot let them overtake something as precious as our democracy. Unfortunately, Republicans in Congress are still peddling conspiracy theories of election fraud, ballot tampering, and more. That's why we're turning to you. You can help us oust every conspiracy theorist fanning the flames of right-wing violence from Congress. Without these Republicans in Congress fueling conspiracy theories, we will see a dramatic drop in alt-right violence. You've been with us since the beginning of our fight to kick out of Congress every fascist who incited the violence on our Capitol, and that's why we need you today. = | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much for standing with us.
